translations.O New Ballard Score soma a pontuação de: The New Ballard Score sums the scores of 6 neuromuscular maturity signs and 6 physical maturity signs. The total score is converted into estimated gestational age (each 5 points ≈ 2 additional weeks).
translations.28 sem) | 10-19 = Muito pré-termo (28-31: 28 wk) | 10-19 = Very preterm (28-31 wk) | 20-32 = Moderate to late preterm (32-36 wk) | ≥33 = Term (≥37 wk).
translations.Índice de Barthel - Atividades de Vida D: Barthel Index - Activities of Daily Living
translations.Calcule o Índice de Barthel para avaliaç: Calculate the Barthel Index for detailed assessment of functional independence in activities of daily living. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Avaliar de forma detalhada o grau de ind: To assess in detail the patient's degree of functional independence in 10 activities of daily living, with scoring proportional to the level of assistance required.
translations.Indicada em reabilitação, geriatria, ava: Indicated in rehabilitation, geriatrics, pre- and post-hospital discharge assessment, and longitudinal follow-up of functional capacity.
translations.Pacientes idosos, em reabilitação ou com: Elderly patients, those in rehabilitation, or with functional sequelae of any etiology.
Ability to feed oneself without assistance.
translations.Necessita ser alimentado por outra pesso: Needs to be fed by another person.
translations.Necessita de ajuda para cortar, passar m: Needs help cutting, buttering, etc., but can eat independently.
Ability to take a full bath.
translations.Toma banho sozinho (entra e sai do chuve: Baths independently (gets in and out of shower/tub without supervision).
translations.Capacidade de lavar o rosto, pentear cab: Ability to wash face, comb hair, brush teeth, shave.
translations.Capacidade de vestir e despir roupas, ca: Ability to put on and take off clothes, put on shoes.
translations.Realiza pelo menos metade da tarefa sozi: Performs at least half of the task independently in reasonable time.
translations.Veste-se, despe-se e ajeita a roupa sem: Dresses, undresses, and adjusts clothing without help.
translations.Episódio ocasional de incontinência (até: Occasional episode of incontinence (up to 1x per week).
translations.Incontinência urinária ou uso de cateter: Urinary incontinence or use of catheter without control.
translations.Controle completo, inclusive de disposit: Complete control, including devices (catheter/collector) if applicable.
translations.Capacidade de ir ao banheiro, despir-se,: Ability to go to the bathroom, undress, clean, and dress.
translations.Necessita de alguma ajuda, mas realiza p: Needs some help but performs part of the task independently.
Uses the bathroom without any help.
translations.Capacidade de se transferir da cama para: Ability to transfer from bed to chair and vice versa.
translations.Não tem equilíbrio para sentar, necessit: No sitting balance, needs mechanical transfer or help from 2 people.
translations.Necessita de ajuda de uma pessoa forte/t: Needs help from one strong/trained person, or two people.
translations.Necessita de pequena ajuda física ou sup: Needs minor physical help or verbal supervision.
translations.Não necessita de qualquer ajuda para a t: Does not need any help for transfer.
translations.Capacidade de se locomover em superfície: Ability to walk on level surfaces.
translations.Incapaz de se locomover ou desloca-se me: Unable to walk or walks less than 50 meters.
translations.Move-se de forma independente em cadeira: Moves independently in wheelchair, including turns, for more than 50 meters.
translations.Anda com ajuda de uma pessoa ou andador,: Walks with help from one person or walker, for more than 50 meters.
translations.Anda sozinho (pode usar apoio como benga: Walks independently (may use support like cane) for more than 50 meters.
translations.Capacidade de subir e descer um lance de: Ability to go up and down one flight of stairs.
translations.Incapaz de subir/descer escadas mesmo co: Unable to go up/down stairs even with help.
translations.Sobe e desce escadas sem ajuda (pode usa: Goes up and down stairs without help (may use handrail).
translations.Dependência total para as atividades de: Total dependence for activities of daily living. Needs complete assistance in practically all tasks.
translations.• Plano de cuidados integral\n• Avaliaçã:
• Comprehensive care plan
• Urgent multidisciplinary assessment
• Prevention of immobility complications
• Full-time caregiver support
translations.Dependência grave. Necessita de ajuda si: Severe dependence. Needs significant help in most basic activities of daily living.
translations.• Reabilitação intensiva\n• Fisioterapia:
• Intensive rehabilitation
• Physical therapy/occupational therapy
• Caregiver support
• Periodic reassessment
translations.Dependência moderada. Necessita de ajuda: Moderate dependence. Requires partial help in several activities, maintaining some autonomy.
translations.• Estímulo à independência residual\n• F:
• Encourage residual independence
• Physical therapy/occupational therapy
• Home environment adaptation
translations.Dependência leve, com boa autonomia func: Mild dependence, with good functional autonomy in most activities.
translations.• Manter estímulo à autonomia\n• Reavali:
• Maintain encouragement of autonomy
• Routine periodic reassessment
translations.Independência total para todas as ativid: Total independence for all assessed basic activities of daily living.
translations.• Reavaliação periódica de rotina\n• Man:
• Routine periodic reassessment
• Maintenance of healthy habits
translations.Capacidade prejudicada de realizar ou co: Impaired ability to perform or complete bathing/hygiene activities by oneself.
translations.Limitação na movimentação voluntária ind: Limitation in independent voluntary movement of body parts or the whole body.
translations.Mudança no hábito normal de eliminação i: Change in normal bowel or urinary elimination pattern, characterized by involuntary elimination.
translations.O Índice de Barthel foi desenvolvido por: The Barthel Index was developed by Florence Mahoney and Dorothea Barthel in 1965, offering a more granular assessment of functional independence than simple binary scales, by assigning different weights according to task complexity.
translations.Amplamente utilizado em reabilitação, ge: Widely used in rehabilitation, geriatrics, and international clinical research, being one of the most cited functional assessment instruments in the literature.
translations.Extensivamente validado em diversas popu: Extensively validated in diverse populations, with good interobserver reliability and sensitivity to detect changes over time, useful for monitoring progress in rehabilitation processes.
translations.Não avalia atividades instrumentais mais: Does not assess more complex instrumental activities (finances, telephone, shopping) — for that, it is recommended to associate the Lawton Scale. May have a ceiling effect in highly functional patients.
translations.Avalie o desempenho real observado, não: Assess actual observed performance, not the theoretical ability reported by the patient.
translations.Combine com a Escala de Lawton para uma: Combine with the Lawton Scale for a complete view of functionality (ADLs + IADLs).
translations.Use a mesma escala em avaliações seriada: Use the same scale in serial assessments to track functional evolution.
translations.Considere o uso de dispositivos de auxíl: Consider the use of assistive devices when scoring each item.
translations.Qual a pontuação máxima do Índice de Bar: What is the maximum score of the Barthel Index?
translations.A soma máxima possível é 100 pontos, ind: The maximum possible sum is 100 points, indicating total independence.
translations.Por que o Barthel usa pesos diferentes p: Why does the Barthel use different weights for each item, unlike the Katz?
translations.Para refletir a complexidade relativa de: To reflect the relative complexity of each task
translations.Não há diferença de peso: There is no difference in weight
translations.O Barthel atribui pontuações proporciona: The Barthel assigns scores proportional to the complexity and degree of assistance required for each task, offering a more granular assessment than binary scales.
translations.O Índice de Barthel avalia atividades in: Does the Barthel Index assess instrumental activities such as financial management?
translations.O Barthel avalia apenas atividades básic: The Barthel assesses only basic activities of daily living; instrumental activities are assessed by the Lawton Scale.
translations.Com que frequência devo reaplicar o Índi: How often should I reapply the Barthel Index?
translations.Recomenda-se reavaliação na admissão, na: Reassessment is recommended at admission, discharge, and periodically during rehabilitation processes to document functional evolution.
translations.O Barthel é mais detalhado que o Katz?: Is the Barthel more detailed than the Katz?
translations.Sim. O Barthel usa uma escala de pontos: Yes. The Barthel uses a weighted point scale (0, 5, 10, or 15 per item) that reflects the degree of assistance needed, while the Katz uses only binary scoring (independent/dependent).
translations.<p>O Índice de Barthel avalia 10 ativida:
The Barthel Index assesses 10 activities of daily living — feeding, bathing, grooming, dressing, bowel and bladder control, toilet use, transfer, mobility, and stair climbing — with scores proportional to the degree of independence in each. The total ranges from 0 to 100 points.

Quick guide: 100 = Total independence | 91-99 = Mild dependence | 61-90 = Moderate | 21-60 = Severe | 0-20 = Total.
translations.Índice de Barthel - Atividades de Vida D: Barthel Index - Activities of Daily Living | Nursing Calculators
translations.Índice de Barthel: cálculo, fundamentaçã: Barthel Index: calculation, rationale, and evidence
translations.Avaliar de forma detalhada o grau de ind: To assess in detail the patient's degree of functional independence in 10 activities of daily living, with scores proportional to the level of assistance needed. Indicated in rehabilitation, geriatrics, pre- and post-discharge evaluation, and longitudinal follow-up of functional capacity.
translations.NOC — Autocuidado: atividades de vida di: NOC — Self-care: activities of daily living

translations.O Índice de Barthel avalia 10 atividades: The Barthel Index assesses 10 activities of daily living — feeding, bathing, grooming, dressing, bowel and bladder control, toilet use, transfer, mobility, and stair climbing — with scores proportional to the degree of independence in each. The total ranges from 0 to 100 points.
translations.100 = Independência total | 91-99 = Depe: 100 = Total independence | 91-99 = Mild dependence | 61-90 = Moderate | 21-60 = Severe | 0-20 = Total.
translations.Escala de Equilíbrio de Berg - Avaliação: Berg Balance Scale - Functional Balance Assessment
translations.Calcule a Escala de Equilíbrio de Berg (: Calculate the Berg Balance Scale to assess functional balance and fall risk. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Avaliar o equilíbrio funcional por meio: Assess functional balance through 14 standardized mobility tasks, estimating fall risk in older adults and other populations.
translations.Indicada na avaliação de equilíbrio de i: Indicated for balance assessment in older adults, post-stroke patients, Parkinson's disease, or other conditions affecting balance.
translations.Idosos e pacientes com comprometimento d: Older adults and patients with balance impairment from various etiologies (stroke, Parkinson's, vestibular disorders).
translations.Capacidade de se levantar de uma posição: Ability to stand up from a sitting position.
translations.Necessita de ajuda mínima para levantar-: Needs minimal help to stand or stabilize
translations.Capaz de levantar-se usando as mãos após: Able to stand using hands after several attempts
translations.Capaz de levantar-se sem usar as mãos e: Able to stand without using hands and stabilize independently
translations.Manutenção da posição em pé sem apoio po: Maintaining standing position without support for 2 minutes.
translations.Incapaz de manter-se em pé por 30 segund: Unable to stand for 30 seconds without help
translations.Necessita de várias tentativas para fica: Needs several attempts to stand unsupported for 30 seconds
translations.Capaz de ficar em pé por 30 segundos sem: Able to stand for 30 seconds unsupported
translations.Capaz de ficar em pé por 2 minutos com s: Able to stand for 2 minutes with supervision
translations.Capaz de ficar em pé com segurança por 2: Able to stand safely for 2 minutes
translations.Manutenção da posição sentada sem apoio: Maintaining sitting position without back support for 2 minutes.
translations.Incapaz de manter-se sentado sem apoio p: Unable to sit unsupported for 10 seconds
translations.Capaz de manter-se sentado por 2 minutos: Able to sit for 2 minutes under supervision
translations.Capaz de manter-se sentado com segurança: Able to sit safely for 2 minutes
translations.Capacidade de sentar-se de forma control: Ability to sit down in a controlled manner.
translations.Senta-se sozinho, mas o movimento de des: Sits independently but descent is uncontrolled
translations.Senta-se com segurança, com uso mínimo d: Sits safely with minimal use of hands
translations.Capacidade de transferir-se entre superf: Ability to transfer between surfaces (e.g., chair and bed).
translations.Necessita de ajuda de duas pessoas para: Needs help of two people for transfer
translations.Capaz de transferir-se com supervisão ve: Able to transfer with verbal supervision and/or physical cueing
translations.Capaz de transferir-se com segurança, co: Able to transfer safely, with definite need of hands
Able to transfer safely, with minimal use of hands
translations.Manutenção do equilíbrio em pé com os ol: Maintaining balance standing with eyes closed for 10 seconds.
translations.Não consegue manter os olhos fechados po: Unable to keep eyes closed for 3 seconds but stays steady
translations.Capaz de manter-se em pé por 10 segundos: Able to stand for 10 seconds with supervision
translations.Capaz de manter-se em pé com segurança p: Able to stand safely for 10 seconds
translations.Manutenção da posição em pé com os pés j: Maintaining standing position with feet together for 1 minute.
translations.Necessita de ajuda para atingir a posiçã: Needs help to attain position and unable to hold for 15 seconds
Needs help to attain position but able to hold for 15 seconds
translations.Capaz de posicionar os pés juntos, mas s: Able to place feet together but unable to hold for 30 seconds
translations.Capaz de posicionar os pés juntos, mante: Able to place feet together and hold for 1 minute with supervision
translations.Capaz de posicionar os pés juntos e mant: Able to place feet together and hold for 1 minute safely
translations.Alcance funcional à frente com o braço e: Functional forward reach with outstretched arm while standing.
translations.Consegue alcançar mais de 12,5 cm com se: Can reach more than 12.5 cm safely
translations.Consegue alcançar à frente com confiança: Can reach forward confidently more than 25 cm
translations.Capacidade de apanhar um objeto do chão: Ability to pick up an object from the floor from a standing position.
translations.Incapaz de tentar / necessita de ajuda p: Unable to try / needs help to avoid losing balance
translations.Incapaz de apanhar e necessita de superv: Unable to pick up and needs supervision while trying
translations.Incapaz de apanhar, mas mantém-se em pé: Unable to pick up, but stands safely
translations.Capaz de apanhar o objeto, mas necessita: Able to pick up the object, but needs supervision
translations.Capaz de apanhar o objeto com facilidade: Able to pick up the object easily and safely
translations.Capacidade de olhar para trás por cima d: Ability to look behind over the left and right shoulder.
translations.Necessita de ajuda para não perder o equ: Needs help to avoid losing balance
translations.Vira apenas para um dos lados, mostrando: Turns only to one side, showing little balance
translations.Vira para os dois lados, apresentando pe: Turns to both sides, showing slight change in balance
translations.Vira para os dois lados com boa mudança: Turns to both sides with good weight shift
translations.Necessita de supervisão próxima ou orien: Needs close supervision or verbal cueing
translations.Capaz de girar 360 graus com segurança,: Able to turn 360 degrees safely but slowly
translations.Capaz de girar 360 graus com segurança e: Able to turn 360 degrees safely in one direction in ≤4 seconds
Able to turn 360 degrees safely in ≤4 seconds in both directions
translations.Alternância dos pés em um banquinho, 4 v: Alternating feet on a stool, 4 times each, standing unsupported.
translations.Incapaz de tentar / necessita de ajuda p: Unable to try / needs help to avoid falling
translations.Capaz de completar menos de 2 alternânci: Able to complete less than 2 alternations, needing minimal assistance
translations.Capaz de completar 4 alternâncias sem ap: Able to complete 4 alternations unsupported, but with supervision
translations.Capaz de ficar em pé sem apoio e complet: Able to stand unsupported and complete 8 alternations in more than 20 seconds
Able to stand unsupported and complete 8 alternations safely in 20 seconds
translations.13. Em Pé sem Apoio com um Pé à Frente: 13. Standing Unsupported with One Foot in Front
translations.Manutenção da posição tandem (um pé dire: Maintaining tandem position (one foot directly in front of the other) for 30 seconds.
translations.Perde o equilíbrio ao posicionar-se ou a: Loses balance when positioning or stepping
translations.Necessita de ajuda para dar o passo, mas: Needs help to step, but can hold for 15 seconds
translations.Capaz de dar o passo à frente sozinho e: Able to step forward on own and hold for 30 seconds
translations.Capaz de colocar um pé à frente do outro: Able to place one foot in front of the other, holding for 30 seconds
translations.Capaz de colocar um pé diretamente à fre: Able to place one foot directly in front of the other (tandem), holding for 30 seconds
translations.Manutenção do equilíbrio em pé sobre uma: Maintaining balance standing on one leg, unsupported.
translations.Incapaz de tentar ou necessita de ajuda: Unable to try or needs help to avoid falling
translations.Tenta levantar a perna, mas não consegue: Attempts to lift leg, but unable to hold for 3 seconds
translations.Capaz de levantar a perna sozinho e mant: Able to lift leg on own and hold for 3 to 5 seconds
Able to lift leg on own and hold for 5 to 10 seconds
Able to lift leg on own and hold for more than 10 seconds
translations.Pontuação de 0 a 20 pontos indica compro: Score of 0 to 20 points indicates significant functional balance impairment and high risk of falls, usually associated with need for assistance with ambulation.
translations.• Encaminhar para avaliação e programa d:
• Refer for specialized physical therapy evaluation and program
• Implement intensive fall prevention measures
• Assess need for gait assistive devices
• Reassess reversible causes of balance impairment
translations.Pontuação de 21 a 40 pontos indica compr: Score of 21 to 40 points indicates moderate balance impairment, with moderate risk of falls.
translations.• Encaminhar para programa de exercícios:
• Refer for balance exercise program
• Provide fall prevention education
• Reassess periodically
• Consider use of gait assistive devices as per evaluation
translations.Pontuação de 41 a 56 pontos indica equil: Score of 41 to 56 points indicates preserved functional balance and low risk of falls related to balance.
translations.• Manter acompanhamento de rotina\n• Est:
• Maintain routine follow-up
• Encourage regular physical activity for balance maintenance
• Reassess after acute health events
translations.Suscetibilidade aumentada a quedas, que: Increased susceptibility to falls, which may cause physical harm and compromise health, related to impaired functional balance.
translations.Limitação no movimento físico independen: Limitation in independent, intentional physical movement of the body or one or more extremities.
translations.Risco de deterioração de sistemas corpor: Risk for deterioration of body systems as a consequence of prescribed or unavoidable musculoskeletal inactivity, related to limitations in functional balance.
translations.Escore da Escala de Berg avaliado e moni: Berg Balance Scale score assessed and monitored over time
translations.Participação em programa de exercícios d: Participation in balance exercise program when indicated
translations.Aplicar a Escala de Equilíbrio de Berg n: Apply the Berg Balance Scale in functional assessment
translations.Encaminhar para fisioterapia conforme gr: Refer to physical therapy according to identified degree of impairment
translations.Adaptar o ambiente para reduzir riscos d: Adapt the environment to reduce fall risks
translations.Orientar sobre uso adequado de dispositi: Educate on proper use of gait assistive devices
translations.A Escala de Equilíbrio de Berg avalia 14: The Berg Balance Scale assesses 14 functional tasks of static and dynamic balance, each scored from 0 to 4, totaling a score from 0 to 56 points, to evaluate functional balance and fall risk.
translations.Desenvolvida por Katherine Berg e colabo: Developed by Katherine Berg and colleagues, it is one of the most widely used tools worldwide for balance assessment, extensively employed in geriatrics, neurology, and rehabilitation.
translations.Extensivamente validada em diversas popu: Extensively validated in diverse populations, including older adults, post-stroke patients, and those with Parkinson's disease, with good interrater reliability and correlation with other measures of mobility and fall risk.
translations.Requer tempo considerável para administr: Requires considerable administration time (15-20 minutes) and adequate space. The optimal cutoff for fall prediction varies across studies and populations (values cited between 40 and 45 points).
translations.A Escala de Berg avalia 14 tarefas funci: The Berg Scale assesses 14 functional tasks, each scored from 0 (unable) to 4 (independent and safe), totaling 56 points.
translations.Diferentes pontos de corte são usados na: Different cutoff points are used in the literature for fall risk (40 to 45 points) — use the value adopted by your institution's protocol.
translations.É necessário espaço adequado, cadeira, b: Adequate space, a chair, a stool, and an object to pick up from the floor are required for full administration.
translations.Combine os resultados com o histórico de: Combine results with history of previous falls and other tools for a more comprehensive risk assessment.
translations.Quantas tarefas compõem a Escala de Equi: How many tasks make up the Berg Balance Scale?
translations.A Escala de Berg é composta por 14 taref: The Berg Scale consists of 14 functional balance tasks, each scored from 0 to 4.
translations.Qual a pontuação máxima da Escala de Ber: What is the maximum score on the Berg Balance Scale?
translations.A pontuação máxima é 56 pontos (14 itens: The maximum score is 56 points (14 items × 4 points each).
translations.Uma pontuação mais baixa na Escala de Be: A lower score on the Berg Balance Scale indicates:
translations.Quanto menor a pontuação, maior o compro: The lower the score, the greater the impairment of functional balance and the higher the fall risk.
translations.Qual o ponto de corte usado para risco d: What cutoff point is used for fall risk on the Berg Balance Scale?
translations.A literatura cita diferentes pontos de c: The literature cites different cutoff points, generally between 40 and 45 points. This calculator uses a three-range stratification (0-20 high risk, 21-40 moderate risk, 41-56 low risk), but the institutional protocol may adopt a specific cutoff.
translations.Quanto tempo leva para aplicar a Escala: How long does it take to administer the Berg Balance Scale?
translations.A aplicação completa das 14 tarefas cost: Full administration of the 14 tasks usually takes 15 to 20 minutes and requires adequate space, a chair with and without armrests, a stool, and an object to be picked up from the floor.
translations.Como funciona a Escala de Equilíbrio de: How does the Berg Balance Scale work?
translations.<p>A Escala de Berg avalia 14 tarefas fu:
The Berg Balance Scale assesses 14 functional balance tasks (sitting, standing, transferring, turning, reaching, among others), each scored from 0 to 4, summing to a total score from 0 to 56 points.

Quick guide: 0-20 = High fall risk | 21-40 = Moderate risk | 41-56 = Low risk.
translations.Escala de Equilíbrio de Berg - Avaliação: Berg Balance Scale - Functional Balance Assessment | Nursing Calculators

translations.Índice de Bishop - Favorabilidade do Col: Bishop Score - Cervical Favorability for Labor Induction
translations.Calcule o Índice de Bishop para avaliar: Calculate the Bishop Score to assess cervical favorability for labor induction. Includes interpretation, nursing care plan, and evidence.
translations.Avaliar a favorabilidade do colo uterino: Assess cervical favorability for labor induction based on 5 parameters of cervical examination and fetal station.
translations.Indicada antes da indução eletiva ou por: Indicated before elective or medically indicated labor induction to estimate the probability of successful induction.
translations.Gestantes a termo ou próximo do termo, c: Pregnant women at term or near term, candidates for labor induction.
translations.Dilatação do colo uterino em centímetros: Dilation of the cervix in centimeters.
translations.Consistência percebida ao toque do colo: Consistency perceived on palpation of the cervix.
translations.Posição do colo em relação ao eixo vagin: Position of the cervix relative to the vaginal axis.
translations.Altura da apresentação fetal em relação: Fetal station relative to the ischial spines.
Unfavorable cervix for induction. Higher probability of prolonged induction and increased chance of cesarean section.
translations.• Considerar métodos de preparo cervical:
• Consider cervical ripening methods before induction, as per medical evaluation
• Discuss risks and benefits of induction with the pregnant woman
• Fetal and maternal monitoring per protocol
translations.Favorabilidade intermediária do colo ute: Intermediate cervical favorability for labor induction.
translations.• Avaliação individualizada quanto ao mé:
• Individualized assessment regarding the most appropriate induction method
• Fetal and maternal monitoring per protocol
translations.Colo uterino favorável, com boa probabil: Favorable cervix, with good probability of successful labor induction and vaginal delivery.
translations.• Proceder com indução conforme método d:
• Proceed with induction as per method defined by the obstetric team
• Fetal and maternal monitoring per protocol
translations.Padrão de preparação e proteção da gravi: A pattern of preparing for and protecting pregnancy, gestation, and the parental role that can be strengthened.
translations.Sensação vaga e incômoda de desconforto: Vague, uneasy feeling of discomfort or dread related to the expectation of labor and induction.
translations.Sinais vitais maternos e fetais estáveis: Stable maternal and fetal vital signs
translations.Participa das decisões sobre o plano de: Participates in decisions about the birth plan
translations.Avaliar a favorabilidade cervical com o: Assess cervical favorability with Bishop Score before induction
translations.Monitorar frequência cardíaca fetal e at: Monitor fetal heart rate and uterine activity during induction
translations.Orientar a gestante sobre o processo de: Educate the pregnant woman about the induction process and warning signs
translations.Comunicar a equipe obstétrica sobre a ev: Communicate the evolution of the condition to the obstetric team
translations.O Índice de Bishop foi desenvolvido por: The Bishop Score was developed by Edward Bishop in 1964, evaluating 5 parameters of cervical examination (dilation, effacement, consistency, and position) and fetal station to estimate cervical favorability for labor induction.
translations.Amplamente utilizado em obstetrícia como: Widely used in obstetrics as a standard criterion for decision-making regarding the method of labor induction (direct induction with oxytocin versus need for prior cervical ripening with prostaglandins or mechanical methods).
translations.Validado extensivamente na literatura ob: Extensively validated in obstetric literature, with good correlation between low scores and higher risk of induction failure (cesarean delivery), being one of the most used instruments worldwide in this assessment.
translations.É um instrumento com certo grau de subje: It is an instrument with a certain degree of subjectivity in cervical examination, potentially presenting interobserver variability. It should not be the sole criterion for decision-making regarding induction, but rather combined with a complete clinical assessment of the pregnant woman and fetus.
translations.Escores mais baixos (colo desfavorável): Lower scores (unfavorable cervix) generally indicate the need for cervical ripening before induction with oxytocin.
translations.Reavalie o Índice de Bishop se houver mu: Reassess the Bishop Score if there is a significant change in cervical examination over follow-up.
translations.Combine sempre com a monitorização fetal: Always combine with continuous fetal monitoring during the induction process.
translations.O índice deve ser interpretado dentro do: The score should be interpreted within the complete clinical context of the pregnant woman, not in isolation.
translations.Quantos parâmetros compõem o Índice de B: How many parameters make up the Bishop Score?
translations.O Índice de Bishop avalia 5 parâmetros:: The Bishop Score evaluates 5 parameters: dilation, effacement, consistency, and position of the cervix, as well as the station of the fetal presenting part.
translations.Um escore de Bishop igual ou menor que 5: A Bishop score equal to or less than 5 indicates what?
translations.Colo desfavorável, maior risco de insuce: Unfavorable cervix, higher risk of induction failure
translations.Escores de 0 a 5 indicam colo desfavoráv: Scores from 0 to 5 indicate an unfavorable cervix, associated with a higher probability of prolonged induction and increased risk of cesarean section.
translations.Para que é usado principalmente o Índice: What is the Bishop Score primarily used for?
translations.Avaliar a favorabilidade do colo uterino: Assess cervical favorability for labor induction
translations.O Índice de Bishop é utilizado especific: The Bishop Score is specifically used to assess cervical favorability before labor induction.
translations.Um colo desfavorável (Bishop baixo) impe: Does an unfavorable cervix (low Bishop) prevent labor induction?
translations.Não impede necessariamente, mas geralmen: It does not necessarily prevent it, but it generally indicates the need for cervical ripening methods before direct induction with oxytocin, as assessed by the obstetric team.
translations.O Índice de Bishop é o único critério pa: Is the Bishop Score the only criterion for deciding on labor induction?
translations.Não. Deve ser combinado com avaliação cl: No. It should be combined with a complete clinical assessment of the pregnant woman and fetus, including the indication for induction, gestational age, and maternal and fetal conditions.
translations.<p>O Índice de Bishop soma pontos de 5 p:
The Bishop Score sums points from 5 parameters — dilation, effacement, consistency, and position of the cervix, as well as the station of the fetal presenting part — totaling 0 to 13 points, which indicate cervical favorability for labor induction.

Quick guide: 0-5 = Unfavorable | 6-8 = Intermediate | 9-13 = Favorable.
translations.Índice de Bishop - Favorabilidade do Col: Bishop Score - Cervical Favorability for Labor Induction | Nursing Calculators
translations.Índice de Bishop: cálculo, fundamentação: Bishop Score: calculation, rationale, and evidence
translations.Avaliar a favorabilidade do colo uterino: Assess cervical favorability for labor induction, based on 5 parameters of cervical examination and station of the fetal presenting part. Indicated before elective or medically indicated labor induction to estimate the probability of successful induction.
translations.· Altura da Apresentação Fetal (Plano de: · Station of Fetal Presenting Part (De Lee's Station):
translations.NANDA — Disposição para processo de mate: NANDA — Readiness for enhanced childbearing process
translations.BISHOP, E. H. Pelvic scoring for electiv: BISHOP, E. H. Pelvic scoring for elective induction. Obstetrics & Gynecology, v. 24, n. 2, p. 266-268, 1964.
translations.FEBRASGO. Federação Brasileira das Assoc: FEBRASGO. Federação Brasileira das Associações de Ginecologia e Obstetrícia. Manual de indução do trabalho de parto. São Paulo: FEBRASGO, 2021.
translations.O Índice de Bishop soma pontos de 5 parâ: The Bishop score sums points from 5 parameters — dilation, effacement, consistency and position of the cervix, and fetal station —, totaling 0 to 13 points, which indicate cervical favorability for induction of labor.
translations.Calcule o BPS (Behavioral Pain Scale) pa: Calculate the BPS (Behavioral Pain Scale) for pain assessment in sedated patients, on mechanical ventilation, or unable to communicate verbally.
translations.Avaliar a intensidade da dor em paciente: Assess pain intensity in patients unable to self-report (sedated, on mechanical ventilation, or with decreased level of consciousness) using observable behavioral indicators.
translations.Indicada para pacientes críticos, sedado: Indicated for critically ill, sedated, or mechanically ventilated patients in whom self-report pain scales are not possible.
translations.Pacientes adultos internados em UTI, sed: Adult patients admitted to the ICU, sedated and/or on mechanical ventilation, unable to communicate verbally.
translations.Observe a expressão facial do paciente e: Observe the patient's facial expression at rest and during manipulation/procedure.
translations.Face em careta evidente, expressão de do: Obvious grimacing, expression of intense pain.
translations.Observe o movimento e postura dos membro: Observe movement and posture of upper limbs.
translations.Flexão total dos membros com contração d: Full flexion of limbs with finger contraction.
translations.Observe o grau de sincronia do paciente: Observe the degree of patient synchrony with the mechanical ventilator.
translations.Sincronia total com o ventilador, sem es: Full synchrony with ventilator, no additional effort.
translations.2 — Tossindo mas Tolerando na Maior Part: 2 — Coughing but Tolerating Most of the Time
translations.Tosse ocasional, mas tolera bem na maior: Occasional cough, but tolerates well most of the time.
translations.Assincronia grave, ventilação impossível: Severe asynchrony, ventilation impossible to control.
translations.Ausência de indicadores comportamentais: Absence of behavioral pain indicators. Minimum possible score on the scale.
translations.• Manter conduta analgésica atual\n• Rea:
• Maintain current analgesic management
• Reassess per protocol, especially before/during procedures
translations.Presença de indicadores comportamentais: Presence of discrete behavioral indicators suggestive of mild pain.
translations.• Reavaliar após qualquer intervenção an:
• Reassess after any analgesic intervention
• Consider optimizing analgesia as prescribed
translations.Indicadores comportamentais compatíveis: Behavioral indicators consistent with moderate pain.
translations.• Comunicar à equipe médica\n• Reavaliar:
• Notify medical team
• Reassess and adjust analgesia
• Reassess at short interval after intervention
translations.Indicadores comportamentais compatíveis: Behavioral indicators consistent with severe pain, including significant ventilator asynchrony.
translations.• Comunicar imediatamente à equipe médic:
• Immediately notify medical team
• Prioritize analgesic intervention
• Reassess frequently until adequate pain control
translations.Utilizar o BPS em pacientes incapazes de: Use BPS in patients unable to self-report
translations.Administrar analgesia conforme prescriçã: Administer analgesia as prescribed and reassess response
translations.Reavaliar a dor antes, durante e após pr: Reassess pain before, during, and after painful procedures
translations.Registrar o escore no prontuário a cada: Record the score in the medical record at each assessment
translations.O BPS (Behavioral Pain Scale) foi desenv: The BPS (Behavioral Pain Scale) was developed by Payen et al. in 2001, assessing 3 behavioral indicators — facial expression, upper limb movements, and compliance with mechanical ventilation — each scored from 1 to 4, to estimate pain intensity in patients unable to self-report.
translations.Amplamente recomendado pelas diretrizes: Widely recommended by international guidelines for pain, agitation, and delirium (PADIS) management as one of the validated tools for pain assessment in non-communicative critically ill patients, alongside the CPOT (Critical-Care Pain Observation Tool).
translations.Apresenta boa confiabilidade interobserv: It presents good interobserver reliability and construct validity in sedated and mechanically ventilated patients, being one of the most studied behavioral pain scales in intensive care.
translations.Não é adequado para pacientes com bloque: It is not suitable for patients with neuromuscular blockade (prevents behavioral assessment) or injuries that impede facial/motor observation. It should be complemented by assessment of physiological signs (heart rate, blood pressure) when available.
translations.Avalie o paciente em repouso e também du: Assess the patient at rest and also during manipulation or procedures, when pain tends to manifest more clearly.
translations.O BPS não é válido em pacientes com bloq: The BPS is not valid in patients with neuromuscular blockade, as it depends on the observation of motor and facial response.
translations.Reavalie antes, durante e após qualquer: Reassess before, during, and after any analgesic intervention or potentially painful procedure.
translations.Combine com sinais fisiológicos (FC, PA): Combine with physiological signs (HR, BP) for a more complete assessment when possible.
translations.Quais os 3 domínios avaliados pelo BPS?: What are the 3 domains assessed by the BPS?
translations.Expressão facial, membros superiores e a: Facial expression, upper limbs, and ventilator adaptation
translations.Pressão arterial, frequência cardíaca e: Blood pressure, heart rate, and temperature
translations.O BPS avalia expressão facial, movimento: The BPS assesses facial expression, upper limb movement, and adaptation to mechanical ventilation, each from 1 to 4 points.
translations.Qual a pontuação mínima e máxima possíve: What is the minimum and maximum possible score on the BPS?
translations.Cada um dos 3 domínios varia de 1 a 4 po: Each of the 3 domains ranges from 1 to 4 points, totaling from 3 (no pain) to 12 (severe pain).
translations.O BPS pode ser usado em pacientes com bl: Can the BPS be used in patients with neuromuscular blockade?
translations.Sim, é o método preferido: Yes, it is the preferred method
translations.Não, pois depende de resposta motora e f: No, because it depends on observable motor and facial response
translations.O BPS depende da observação de resposta: The BPS depends on the observation of facial and motor response, being invalid in patients with neuromuscular blockade that prevents these responses.
translations.O BPS substitui a autoavaliação da dor q: Does the BPS replace self-report of pain when the patient can communicate?
translations.Não. Escalas comportamentais como o BPS: No. Behavioral scales like the BPS should be used only when the patient is unable to self-report. Whenever possible, self-report (e.g., Numeric Pain Rating Scale) is preferred.
translations.Com que frequência o BPS deve ser reaval: How often should the BPS be reassessed?
translations.Recomenda-se reavaliação a cada turno, a: Reassessment is recommended every shift, before and after potentially painful procedures, and after any analgesic intervention, within the expected duration of action of the medication.
translations.<p>O BPS soma pontos de 3 domínios compo:
The BPS sums scores from 3 behavioral domains — facial expression, upper limb movement, and adaptation to mechanical ventilation — each scored from 1 to 4, totaling from 3 (no pain) to 12 (severe pain).

Quick guide: 3 = No pain | 4-5 = Mild pain | 6-8 = Moderate pain | 9-12 = Severe pain.
translations.BPS - Behavioral Pain Scale (Escala Comp: BPS - Behavioral Pain Scale | Nursing Calculators
translations.Behavioral Pain Scale: cálculo, fundamen: Behavioral Pain Scale: calculation, rationale, and evidence
translations.2 — 2 — Tossindo mas Tolerando na Maior: 2 — 2 — Coughing but Tolerating Most of the Time
translations.Avaliar a intensidade da dor em paciente: Assess pain intensity in patients unable to self-report (sedated, mechanically ventilated, or with decreased level of consciousness) using observable behavioral indicators. Indicated for critically ill, sedated, or mechanically ventilated patients in whom self-assessment of pain using numeric scales is not possible.
translations.PAYEN, J. F. et al. Assessing pain in cr: PAYEN, J. F. et al. Assessing pain in critically ill sedated patients by using a behavioral pain scale. Critical Care Medicine, v. 29, n. 12, p. 2258-2263, 2001.
translations.DEVLIN, J. W. et al. Clinical Practice G: DEVLIN, J. W. et al. Clinical Practice Guidelines for the Prevention and Management of Pain, Agitation/Sedation, Delirium, Immobility, and Sleep Disruption in Adult Patients in the ICU (PADIS). Critical Care Medicine, v. 46, n. 9, p. e825-e873, 2018.
translations.O BPS soma pontos de 3 domínios comporta: The BPS sums points from 3 behavioral domains — facial expression, upper limb movement, and ventilator compliance — each scored from 1 to 4, totaling from 3 (no pain) to 12 (severe pain).
translations.3 = Sem dor | 4-5 = Dor leve | 6-8 = Dor: 3 = No pain | 4-5 = Mild pain | 6-8 = Moderate pain | 9-12 = Severe pain.
translations.Calendário vacinal por faixa etária — PN: Vaccination schedule by age group — PNI.
translations.Consulte vacinas por idade e doenças alv: Check vaccines by age and target diseases.
translations.Calcule o valor das férias com o adicion: Calculate the vacation amount with the additional 1/3 constitutional based on base salary and vacation days. Free tool.
translations.Estimar o valor total das férias, inclui: Estimate the total vacation amount, including the constitutional additional 1/3, based on the base salary and the number of vacation days the worker is entitled to.
translations.Útil para profissionais de enfermagem e: Useful for nursing professionals and other workers to check the amount received as vacation, whether taken or sold (pecuniary allowance).
translations.Trabalhadores celetistas com direito a f: CLT workers entitled to annual paid vacation.
translations.Total de dias de direito a férias no per: Total number of vacation days entitled in the period (30 days for full vacation; less for proportional vacation). The final amount is the same whether the period is taken as rest or converted into pecuniary allowance (sale of up to 1/3 of vacation).
translations.Valor estimado das férias, já incluindo: Estimated vacation amount, including the constitutional additional 1/3, based on the reported salary and the number of vacation days the worker is entitled to.
translations.• Confira o valor com o holerite e o dep:
• Check the amount with your pay stub and HR department
• Remember that vacation pay must be made up to 2 days before the start of the vacation period
• If in doubt, consult the category union or an accounting/labor law professional
translations.O direito a férias anuais remuneradas co: The right to annual paid vacation with at least 1/3 more than the normal salary is provided for in Art. 7, item XVII, of the Federal Constitution of 1988, and regulated by Arts. 129 to 145 of the CLT. After each 12-month work period (acquisition period), the worker is entitled to 30 days of vacation, and may convert up to 1/3 of this period into pecuniary allowance (sale of vacation).
translations.O abono pecuniário (venda de até 10 dias: The pecuniary allowance (sale of up to 10 vacation days) does not represent additional payment beyond the normal vacation amount — it merely converts rest days into advance payment, maintaining the total amount proportional to the 30-day entitlement, always plus the constitutional 1/3 on the total.
translations.O cálculo pode ser proporcional em casos: The calculation may be proportional in cases of incomplete vacation (less than 12 months worked) or contract termination, requiring adjustment according to the number of months/days worked in the acquisition period.
translations.Esta calculadora apresenta uma estimativ: This calculator provides a simplified estimate for educational and verification purposes, considering only the reported base salary. It does not replace the official payroll calculation or guidance from an accounting or labor law professional. Averages of habitual additional payments (overtime, night shift differential) must be included in the actual vacation calculation base.
translations.O pagamento das férias deve ser feito at: Vacation payment must be made up to 2 days before the start of the vacation period.
translations.O valor total das férias é o mesmo, seja: The total vacation amount is the same whether the period is fully taken or partially converted into pecuniary allowance.
translations.Se houver médias de horas extras, adicio: If there are averages of overtime, night shift differential, or habitual commissions, they must be included in the actual calculation base, in addition to the base salary.
translations.Em caso de férias proporcionais (menos d: In case of proportional vacation (less than 12 months worked), adjust the number of vacation days entered.
translations.Qual o adicional constitucional aplicado: What is the constitutional additional applied to the vacation amount?
translations.O Art. 7º, XVII, da Constituição Federal: Art. 7, XVII, of the Federal Constitution guarantees paid vacation with at least 1/3 more than the normal salary.
translations.O abono pecuniário (venda de férias) aum: Does the pecuniary allowance (sale of vacation) increase the total amount received?
translations.Sim, sempre dobra o valor: Yes, it always doubles the amount
translations.Não, apenas converte dias de descanso em: No, it only converts rest days into advance payment, keeping the total amount proportional.
translations.Sim, mas apenas para quem trabalha mais: Yes, but only for those who have worked more than 10 years at the company.
translations.O abono pecuniário foi extinto pela refo: The pecuniary leave was abolished by the labor reform.
translations.O abono pecuniário não é um pagamento ex: Pecuniary leave is not an extra payment — it converts up to 1/3 of vacation days (10 days) into advance payment, but the total amount remains proportional to the 30 days of entitlement, always with the constitutional 1/3.
translations.Até quando o empregador deve pagar as fé: By when must the employer pay the worker's vacation?
translations.No dia do retorno ao trabalho: On the day of return to work.
translations.Até 2 dias antes do início do período de: Up to 2 days before the start of the vacation period.
translations.Até 30 dias após o início das férias: Up to 30 days after the start of the vacation.
translations.Não há prazo definido em lei: There is no deadline defined by law.
translations.A CLT determina que o pagamento das féri: The CLT determines that vacation payment must be made up to 2 days before the start of the respective vacation period.
translations.Não. É uma ferramenta educacional para e: No. It is an educational tool for estimation and verification. The official calculation must consider averages of habitual additional payments and other contractual particularities, being the responsibility of the company's HR department.
translations.É possível vender todas as férias?: Is it possible to sell all vacation days?
translations.Não. A CLT permite a conversão em abono: No. The CLT allows the conversion into pecuniary leave of at most 1/3 of the vacation period (i.e., up to 10 days out of a total of 30), with at least 20 days of effective rest being mandatory.
translations.<p>O valor das férias é calculado a part:
The vacation amount is calculated from the daily salary (base salary ÷ 30), multiplied by the number of vacation days the worker is entitled to, plus the constitutional additional 1/3 of that amount.

Formula: Vacation Amount = (Salary ÷ 30) × Vacation Days × 4/3 (where 4/3 represents the full amount plus the additional 1/3).
translations.Calculadora de Férias: cálculo, fundamen: Vacation Calculator: calculation, rationale, and evidence
translations.Estimar o valor total das férias, inclui: Estimate the total vacation amount, including the constitutional additional 1/3, based on the base salary and the number of vacation days the worker is entitled to. Useful for nursing professionals and other workers to verify the amount received for vacation, whether taken or sold (pecuniary leave).
translations.BRASIL. Constituição Federal de 1988. Ar: BRAZIL. Federal Constitution of 1988. Art. 7, XVII.
BRAZIL. Decree-Law No. 5,452/1943 (CLT). Arts. 129 to 145 — Annual vacations.
translations.O valor das férias é calculado a partir: The vacation amount is calculated from the daily salary (base salary ÷ 30), multiplied by the number of vacation days the worker is entitled to, plus the constitutional additional 1/3 of that amount.
translations.Valor das Férias = (Salário ÷ 30) × Dias: Vacation Amount = (Salary ÷ 30) × Vacation Days × 4/3 (where 4/3 represents the full amount plus the additional 1/3).
translations.Calcule o valor das horas extras a parti: Calculate the value of overtime based on base salary, number of hours, and applicable percentage (50% or 100%). Free tool.
translations.Estimar o valor das horas extras trabalh: Estimate the value of overtime worked, based on base salary, number of overtime hours, and applicable percentage.
translations.Útil para profissionais de enfermagem e: Useful for nursing professionals and other workers who perform overtime, to check the amount received on pay stub.
translations.Trabalhadores celetistas que realizam jo: CLT workers who perform extraordinary work hours (overtime).
translations.Total de horas extras trabalhadas no per: Total overtime hours worked in the period to be calculated.
translations.Percentual mínimo garantido pela Constit: Minimum percentage guaranteed by the Federal Constitution is 50%. Sundays, holidays, and some collective agreements may provide a higher percentage.
translations.Valor estimado das horas extras devidas,: Estimated value of overtime due, based on the salary provided, number of overtime hours, and applicable percentage.
translations.• Confira o valor com o holerite e o dep:
• Check the value with your pay stub and HR department
• Verify if the category's collective agreement provides a percentage higher than the constitutional minimum
• If in doubt, consult the category's union or an accounting/labor law professional
translations.O direito à remuneração de horas extras: The right to overtime pay with a minimum 50% increase over the normal hourly rate is provided in Art. 7, item XVI, of the Federal Constitution of 1988 and regulated by Art. 59 of the CLT. The divisor 220 corresponds to the standard monthly workload of 44 hours per week (220 = 44 hours × 5 weeks, approximately).
translations.Convenções e acordos coletivos de trabal: Collective bargaining agreements often establish a 100% percentage for overtime performed on Sundays and holidays, although this percentage is not an automatic federal legal minimum, depending on the professional category.
translations.O cálculo pode variar conforme o divisor: The calculation may vary according to the salary divisor applicable to the category (220h is the most common for a 44-hour workweek, but other divisors may apply for different workloads, such as 200h or 180h).
translations.Esta calculadora apresenta uma estimativ: This calculator provides a simplified estimate for educational and verification purposes. It does not replace the official payroll calculation or guidance from an accounting or labor law professional. When applicable, the hours bank may change the way overtime is compensated.
translations.Confirme o divisor salarial aplicável à: Confirm the salary divisor applicable to your category (220h is the standard for a 44-hour workweek).
translations.Verifique a convenção coletiva da catego: Check the category's collective agreement, which may provide a percentage higher than the constitutional minimum of 50%.
translations.Se a empresa adotar banco de horas, as h: If the company adopts a hours bank, overtime may be compensated with time off instead of payment — check the current agreement.
translations.As horas extras habituais integram o cál: Regular overtime is included in the calculation of vacation pay, 13th salary, and FGTS.
translations.Qual o percentual mínimo constitucional: What is the minimum constitutional percentage for overtime?
translations.A Constituição Federal (Art. 7º, XVI) ga: The Federal Constitution (Art. 7, XVI) guarantees a minimum 50% increase over the normal hourly rate for overtime work.
translations.O que é o divisor 220 usado no cálculo d: What is the divisor 220 used in calculating the normal hourly rate?
translations.Número de dias do ano: Number of days in the year
translations.Jornada mensal padrão para 44h semanais: Standard monthly workload for 44h per week
translations.Número de feriados no ano: Number of holidays in the year
translations.Não tem relação com o cálculo: It has no relation to the calculation
translations.O divisor 220 corresponde à jornada mens: The divisor 220 corresponds to the standard monthly workload for a 44-hour workweek, being the most common, but may vary according to the category.
translations.O banco de horas elimina o pagamento de: Does the hours bank eliminate overtime pay?
translations.Pode substituir o pagamento por compensa: It may replace payment with compensatory time off, as agreed
translations.Não tem relação com horas extras: It is not related to overtime
translations.O banco de horas permite compensar horas: The time bank allows compensating overtime with time off instead of payment, provided that the applicable legal limits and agreements are respected.
translations.Não. É uma ferramenta educacional para e: No. It is an educational tool for estimation and verification. The official calculation must be performed by the company's HR department, considering the collective bargaining agreement and applicable salary divisor.
translations.Horas extras habituais alteram o valor d: Do habitual overtime hours affect the value of other labor entitlements?
translations.Sim. Horas extras realizadas de forma ha: Yes. Habitual overtime hours are included in the calculation basis for vacation pay, 13th salary, FGTS, and may impact severance payments, according to consolidated understanding in Labor Courts.
translations.<p>O valor da hora extra é calculado a p:
The overtime value is calculated from the normal hourly rate (salary ÷ 220, for a 44-hour workweek), multiplied by the number of overtime hours worked, and increased by the applicable overtime percentage (minimum 50%, may be higher per collective agreement or work on Sundays/holidays).

Formula: Overtime Value = (Salary ÷ 220) × Overtime Hours × (1 + Percentage/100).
translations.Calculadora de Hora Extra: cálculo, fund: Overtime Calculator: Calculation, Rationale, and Evidence
translations.Estimar o valor das horas extras trabalh: Estimate the value of overtime hours worked, based on base salary, number of overtime hours, and applicable overtime percentage. Useful for nursing professionals and other workers who perform overtime, to verify the amount received on pay stub.
translations.BRASIL. Constituição Federal de 1988. Ar: BRAZIL. Federal Constitution of 1988. Art. 7, XVI.
BRAZIL. Decree-Law No. 5,452/1943 (CLT). Art. 59 — Working hours and overtime.
translations.O valor da hora extra é calculado a part: The overtime value is calculated from the normal hourly rate (salary ÷ 220, for a 44-hour workweek), multiplied by the number of overtime hours worked, and increased by the applicable overtime percentage (minimum 50%, may be higher per collective agreement or work on Sundays/holidays).
translations.Calcule uma estimativa das verbas rescis: Calculate an estimate of severance pay in case of unfair dismissal: salary balance, notice period, vacation pay, proportional 13th salary, and FGTS fine.
translations.Estimar o total das principais verbas re: Estimate the total of the main severance payments due in case of unfair dismissal: salary balance, notice period, accrued and proportional vacation pay + 1/3, proportional 13th salary, and 40% fine on FGTS.
translations.Útil para profissionais de enfermagem e: Useful for nursing professionals and other workers to check an estimate of the total amount to receive in case of unfair dismissal.
translations.Trabalhadores celetistas desligados por: Employees under CLT (Brazilian labor law) dismissed without just cause (employer initiative).
translations.Salário base mensal do trabalhador na da: Monthly base salary of the worker at the date of termination.
translations.Dias Trabalhados no Mês da Rescisão: Days Worked in the Month of Termination
translations.Quantidade de dias trabalhados no mês em: Number of days worked in the month in which the dismissal occurred (salary balance).
translations.Anos completos trabalhados na empresa, u: Full years worked at the company, used for calculating proportional notice period (3 additional days per full year, up to the legal limit of 90 days).
translations.Dias de férias de período aquisitivo já: Vacation days from an already completed accrual period, not yet taken or paid.
translations.Meses do Período Aquisitivo Atual de Fér: Months of Current Vacation Accrual Period
translations.Meses trabalhados no período aquisitivo: Months worked in the current vacation accrual period (proportional vacation).
translations.Meses Trabalhados no Ano Corrente (13º P: Months Worked in the Current Year (Proportional 13th Salary)
translations.Meses trabalhados no ano corrente, para: Months worked in the current year for calculating proportional 13th salary.
translations.Saldo total depositado na conta do FGTS: Total balance deposited in the worker's FGTS account, for calculating the 40% termination fine.
translations.Valor Total Estimado das Verbas Rescisór: Total Estimated Amount of Severance Payments
translations.Estimativa do total de verbas rescisória: Estimate of total severance payments for unfair dismissal, summing salary balance, notice period (indemnified, proportional to years of service), accrued and proportional vacation + 1/3, proportional 13th salary, and 40% fine on FGTS balance.
translations.• Confira o valor com o Termo de Rescisã:
• Check the amount with the Employment Termination Agreement (TRCT)
• Proportional notice period is limited to 90 total days by law — manually review if the employee has more than 20 years at the company
• If in doubt, consult the category union or an accounting/labor law professional
translations.O cálculo de rescisão trabalhista por de: The calculation of severance pay for unfair dismissal sums various items: salary balance (days worked in the month), indemnified notice period (30 days plus 3 days per full year of service, according to Law No. 12,506/2011, limited to 90 days), accrued and proportional vacation plus 1/3 constitutional addition, proportional 13th salary, and termination fine of 40% on the FGTS balance (Art. 18, §1, Law No. 8,036/1990).
translations.Cada tipo de desligamento (demissão sem: Each type of dismissal (unfair dismissal, resignation, dismissal for cause, mutual agreement between employee and employer according to Art. 484-A of CLT) entitles different benefits. This calculator only covers the scenario of unfair dismissal by employer initiative, the most common and complete in terms of rights.
translations.O valor real pode variar conforme conven: The actual amount may vary according to collective bargaining agreements, averages of habitual additional payments (overtime, night shift premium, commissions) that must compose the calculation basis, and possible deductions (social security, income tax, advances, transportation vouchers).
translations.Esta calculadora apresenta uma estimativ: This calculator provides a simplified estimate for educational purposes, considering only the scenario of dismissal without just cause. It does not include INSS/IRRF discounts, averages of habitual additional payments, nor does it cover other types of termination (resignation, dismissal for just cause, mutual agreement, end of probationary contract), which have their own rules. It does not replace the official termination calculation or guidance from an accounting or labor law professional.
translations.Esta calculadora contempla apenas demiss: This calculator only covers dismissal without just cause — resignation and dismissal for just cause have very different entitlements (e.g., no paid notice period from the employer and no FGTS fine).
translations.O aviso prévio proporcional é limitado a: The proportional notice period is limited to 90 total days by law, even if the simple calculation (30 + 3×years) exceeds this value for workers with more than 20 years at the company.
translations.Lembre-se de incluir médias de horas ext: Remember to include averages of habitual overtime and night shift premiums in the actual calculation base, which are not covered in this simplified estimate.
translations.O Termo de Rescisão do Contrato de Traba: The Termination of Employment Contract (TRCT) must detail each payment separately — use it for verification.
translations.Rescisão recente, pouco tempo de casa: Recent termination, short time at the company
translations.Quais verbas compõem tipicamente uma res: What payments typically make up a termination for dismissal without just cause?
translations.Apenas o salário do último mês: Only the salary of the last month
translations.Saldo de salário, aviso prévio, férias +: Outstanding salary, notice period, vacation + 1/3, proportional 13th salary, and FGTS fine
translations.A rescisão sem justa causa tipicamente s: Termination without just cause typically includes outstanding salary, notice period, accrued/proportional vacation + 1/3, proportional 13th salary, and 40% FGTS fine.
translations.Qual o limite máximo legal do aviso prév: What is the maximum legal limit for proportional notice period?
translations.A Lei nº 12.506/2011 estabelece 30 dias: Law No. 12,506/2011 establishes 30 days of notice plus 3 days for each full year of service, limited to a total of 90 days.
translations.A multa de 40% do FGTS é devida em qualq: Is the 40% FGTS fine due in any type of termination?
translations.Não, apenas em demissão sem justa causa: No, only in dismissal without just cause initiated by the employer
translations.Apenas em demissão por justa causa: Only in dismissal for just cause
translations.A multa de 40% do FGTS é devida especifi: The 40% FGTS fine is specifically due in case of dismissal without just cause initiated by the employer, not applying to resignation or dismissal for just cause.
translations.Esta calculadora serve para pedido de de: Does this calculator work for resignation or dismissal for just cause?
translations.Não. Esta calculadora contempla apenas o: No. This calculator only covers the scenario of dismissal without just cause initiated by the employer. Resignation and dismissal for just cause follow different rules, with reduced entitlements (no paid notice period from the employer and no FGTS fine).
translations.O resultado desta calculadora é o valor: Is the result of this calculator the exact amount I will receive?
translations.Não. É uma estimativa educacional simpli: No. It is a simplified educational estimate. The actual amount may vary depending on INSS/IRRF discounts, averages of habitual additional payments, and other contractual specifics. Consult the official Termination of Employment Contract (TRCT) or an accounting/labor law professional for the exact amount.
translations.<p>Esta calculadora soma as principais v:
This calculator sums the main payments of a dismissal without just cause: outstanding salary, paid notice period (proportional to years of service), accrued and proportional vacation plus 1/3, proportional 13th salary, and 40% fine on the FGTS balance.

Attention: this is a simplified educational calculation. It does not replace the official Termination of Employment Contract (TRCT) or guidance from an accounting or labor law professional.

Useful for nursing professionals and other workers to check an estimate of the total amount to receive in case of unfair dismissal.
