translations.Escala ELPO - Risco de Lesão por Posicio: ELPO Scale - Risk of Injury from Surgical Positioning
translations.Calcule a Escala ELPO (Avaliação de Risc: Calculate the ELPO Scale (Risk Assessment for Injuries from Surgical Positioning) to identify the risk of pressure injury in the perioperative period. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Escala de Avaliação de Risco para Lesões: Risk Assessment Scale for Injuries from Surgical Positioning
translations.Avaliar o risco de desenvolvimento de le: Assess the risk of developing pressure injuries and other complications from surgical positioning, considering 7 intraoperative risk factors.
translations.Indicada para pacientes cirúrgicos, no p: Indicated for surgical patients in the preoperative period for planning preventive measures for positioning on the surgical table.
translations.Pacientes adultos submetidos a procedime: Adult patients undergoing surgical procedures under general, regional, or local anesthesia.
translations.Selecione a posição cirúrgica adotada pa: Select the surgical position adopted for the procedure.
translations.Selecione a duração estimada ou real do: Select the estimated or actual duration of the surgical procedure.
translations.Selecione o tipo de anestesia utilizada: Select the type of anesthesia used in the procedure.
translations.Selecione o tipo de colchão e coxins uti: Select the type of mattress and cushions used for positioning.
translations.Sem superfície de suporte, ou suportes r: No support surface, or rigid supports without padding, or narrow stirrups
translations.Selecione a condição de posicionamento d: Select the positioning condition of the patient's limbs.
translations.Elevação dos joelhos < 90° e abertura do: Knee elevation < 90° and lower limb abduction < 90°, or neck without mentosternal alignment
translations.Elevação dos joelhos > 90° ou abertura d: Knee elevation > 90° or lower limb abduction > 90°
translations.Elevação dos joelhos > 90° e abertura do: Knee elevation > 90° and lower limb abduction > 90°, or upper limb abduction > 90°
translations.Selecione a comorbidade mais relevante a: Select the most relevant comorbidity presented by the patient.
translations.Úlcera por pressão ou neuropatia previam: Previously diagnosed pressure ulcer or neuropathy, or deep vein thrombosis
translations.Menor risco de desenvolvimento de lesões: Lower risk of developing injuries from surgical positioning.
translations.• Manter posicionamento adequado conform:
• Maintain appropriate positioning per institutional protocol
• Reassess in prolonged surgeries or position changes
• Document positioning and devices used
translations.Maior risco de desenvolvimento de lesões: Higher risk of developing pressure injuries and complications from surgical positioning (respiratory, vascular, neurological, or integumentary).
translations.• Priorizar superfícies de suporte de vi:
• Prioritize viscoelastic support surfaces and specific cushions
• Pay extra attention to body alignment and bony prominences
• Consider repositioning/reassessment in very prolonged surgeries
• Communicate the identified high risk to the surgical team
translations.Risco de alteração na epiderme e/ou derm: Risk for alteration in epidermis and/or dermis related to prolonged pressure and inadequate surgical positioning.
translations.Risco de perturbação na circulação, sens: Risk of impaired circulation, sensation, or movement of an extremity related to positioning with compression of neurovascular structures.
translations.Integridade tissular: pele e mucosas: Tissue integrity: skin and mucous membranes
translations.Ausência de lesão por pressão no pós-ope: Absence of pressure injury in the postoperative period
translations.Perfusão tecidual mantida nas áreas de m: Maintained tissue perfusion in areas of higher pressure
translations.Ausência de queixas de dor ou parestesia: Absence of complaints of pain or paresthesia in limbs after the procedure
translations.Avaliar os 7 itens da escala ELPO no pré: Assess the 7 items of the ELPO scale preoperatively
translations.Selecionar superfícies de suporte e coxi: Select appropriate support surfaces and cushions according to the identified risk
translations.Posicionar o paciente mantendo alinhamen: Position the patient maintaining body alignment whenever possible
translations.Proteger proeminências ósseas e estrutur: Protect bony prominences and neurovascular structures
translations.Documentar a posição, os dispositivos ut: Document the position, devices used, and the ELPO score obtained
translations.A ELPO avalia 7 itens (tipo de posição c: The ELPO assesses 7 items (type of surgical position, surgery duration, type of anesthesia, support surface, limb position, comorbidities, and patient age), each with 5 sub-items scored from 1 (lowest risk) to 5 (highest risk), totaling 7 to 35 points. Scores from 20 points indicate higher risk of complications due to surgical positioning.
translations.Desenvolvida por Camila Mendonça de Mora: Developed by Camila Mendonça de Moraes Lopes as part of her doctoral thesis at the Ribeirão Preto College of Nursing, University of São Paulo (EERP-USP), defended in 2013, with validation published in 2016 in the Latin American Journal of Nursing.
translations.Validada quanto ao conteúdo e à aparênci: Validated for content and appearance by experts, and applied in different Brazilian surgical contexts (including cardiovascular, urological, and orthopedic surgeries), proving to be a useful instrument to identify patients at higher risk of positioning injuries.
translations.A pontuação de cada item considera apena: The score for each item considers only the highest risk condition present; it does not weigh the simultaneous interaction between multiple risk factors. Specific training of the perioperative nursing team is recommended for standardized application.
translations.A ELPO possui 7 itens, cada um com 5 sub: The ELPO has 7 items, each with 5 sub-items scored from 1 (lowest risk) to 5 (highest risk), totaling 7 to 35 points.
translations.Escores a partir de 20 pontos indicam ma: Scores from 20 points indicate higher risk of injuries due to surgical positioning.
translations.A superfície de suporte é um dos fatores: The support surface is one of the most important modifiable factors: the use of viscoelastic mattresses and cushions significantly reduces the risk score.
translations.A avaliação deve ser feita no pré-operat: Assessment should be performed preoperatively, considering the planned position and estimated surgery duration.
translations.Colecistectomia videolaparoscópica curta: Short laparoscopic cholecystectomy, young, no comorbidities
translations.Revascularização do miocárdio, supina, 5: Coronary artery bypass grafting, supine, 5h, general anesthesia, elderly with vascular disease
translations.Cirurgia urológica robótica em posição l: Robotic urological surgery in prolonged lithotomy position, elderly with neuropathy
translations.Quantos itens compõem a escala ELPO?: How many items make up the ELPO scale?
translations.A ELPO é composta por 7 itens: tipo de p: The ELPO consists of 7 items: type of surgical position, surgery duration, type of anesthesia, support surface, limb position, comorbidities, and patient age.
translations.A partir de qual escore o paciente é cla: From which score is the patient classified as higher risk on the ELPO?
translations.Escores a partir de 20 pontos (de um tot: Scores from 20 points (out of a possible total of 7 to 35) classify the patient as higher risk for developing surgical positioning injuries.
translations.Qual posição cirúrgica recebe a maior po: Which surgical position receives the highest risk score on the ELPO?
translations.A posição litotômica recebe pontuação 5: The lithotomy position receives a score of 5 (highest risk), while the supine position receives a score of 1 (lowest risk).
translations.Quando a escala ELPO deve ser aplicada?: When should the ELPO scale be applied?
translations.No período pré-operatório, para planejar: In the preoperative period, to plan preventive positioning measures and support devices to be used during surgery.
translations.A ELPO substitui a avaliação de risco de: Does ELPO replace general pressure injury risk assessment (e.g., Braden)?
translations.Não. A ELPO é específica para os riscos: No. ELPO is specific to risks from intraoperative surgical positioning, complementing (not replacing) general pressure injury risk scales such as Braden.
translations.<p>A ELPO avalia 7 fatores de risco para:
The ELPO assesses 7 risk factors for injuries from surgical positioning, each scored from 1 to 5, totaling 7 to 35 points.

Interpretation: ≤ 19 points = lower risk | ≥ 20 points = higher risk of complications from surgical positioning.

It measures workers' perceptions of their routines, cognitive and emotional demands, relationship with management, and possible symptoms of stress and burnout.

translations.O padrão para uso de profissionais de sa: The standard for use by occupational health professionals. It assesses risks in detail, aiding in planning and company audits.

translations.E o que mudou na transição do COPSOQ II: And what changed in the transition from COPSOQ II to COPSOQ III?
translations.A matemática e a espinha dorsal mantiver: The mathematics and backbone remained the same, but COPSOQ III was modernized for the challenges of the current decade. New important psychosocial factors were included, such as the assessment of
translations., Tarefas Ilegítimas, insegurança das co: , Illegitimate Tasks, insecurity of working conditions, and organizational engagement metrics.
translations.Para que o questionário não seja apenas: To ensure the questionnaire is not just a "collection of opinions," the tool converts emotions into quantitative data. Learn below how to extract results and understand the "traffic light rule" in a very didactic way:
translations.A Escala Likert e a Pontuação Base: The Likert Scale and Base Score
translations.Todos os itens que compõem o questionári: All items in the questionnaire are assessed using a 5-point Likert scale. The scoring of responses strictly follows these values, so each item can be scored from 1 to 5 points. This score follows the direct direction of the selected alternative. For example, responses range from "1 - Never/almost never" to "5 - Always," or from "1 - Not at all/almost nothing" to "5 - Extremely."
translations.Por que deve ser feito assim?: Why should it be done this way?
translations.O questionário não mede apenas um concei: The questionnaire does not measure a single generalist concept, but rather dozens of distinct variables, such as health levels, satisfaction degrees, and specific psychosocial risks for each individual. Establishing this direct score from 1 to 5 allows transforming subjective and qualitative perceptions into a standard numerical basis.
translations.Embora a grande maioria das perguntas si: Although the vast majority of questions follow the direct scoring we saw in Step 1, there are specific and very important exceptions. Some questions are formulated inversely to the general concept of that group. For the math to work in the end, the scores of these specific items need to be "mirrored" (inverted).
translations.• Se a pessoa marcou 1, a pontuação cota: • If the person marked 1, the assigned score will be 5.
translations.• Se a pessoa marcou 2, a pontuação cota: • If the person marked 2, the assigned score will be 4.
translations.• Se a pessoa marcou 3, a pontuação cota: • If the person marked 3, the assigned score remains 3.
translations.• Se a pessoa marcou 4, a pontuação cota: • If the person marked 4, the assigned score will be 2.
translations.• Se a pessoa marcou 5, a pontuação cota: • If the person marked 5, the assigned score will be 1.

translations.Imagine que estamos medindo um fator pos: Imagine we are measuring a positive factor such as "Trust." If the question is "Does management withhold information from its employees?" and the person answers "5 - Always," this indicates
translations.de confiança. Ao aplicarmos a inversão m: of trust. By applying mathematical inversion (transforming this 5 into a 1), we can align the response to speak the same numerical "language" as the other positive questions.
translations.Cálculo das Médias por Fator e a Regra d: Calculation of Means per Factor and the Traffic Light Rule
translations.Agora que todas as perguntas já têm uma: Now that all questions have a standardized score from 1 to 5 (with the corrected items), it is time to group and interpret the results. The process works as follows:
translations.Você deve agrupar as perguntas que perte: You must group the questions belonging to the same subscale (e.g., "Burnout" block) and calculate the simple mean of the responses, summing them and dividing by the number of variables.
translations.Atenção ao Sentido da Nota:: Attention to the Meaning of the Score:
translations.O significado do número muda conforme o: The meaning of the number changes depending on the theme. For example, a mean of 4 points in the factor "Possibilities for Development" represents an optimal situation. However, a mean of 4 points in the factor "Job Insecurity" represents a terrible risk situation.
translations.A Divisão em Tercis (A Regra do Semáforo: Division into Tertiles (The Traffic Light Rule):
translations.Para tornar a visualização do risco inst: To make risk visualization instantaneous and understandable, the score range (from 1 to 5) is mathematically divided into three equal parts (tertiles). The corporate cutoff points required by the literature are exactly

translations.(ou radioscopia) é realizada através de: (or radioscopy) is performed using a mobile X-ray device known as a "C-Arm." It allows dynamic, real-time visualization of the patient's internal anatomy during surgery, being essential in orthopedic, urological, vascular surgeries, and pacemaker implants.
translations.Garantir o uso de EPIs radiológicos (ave: Ensure the use of radiological PPE (lead aprons and thyroid shields) for all staff in the room.
translations.Auxiliar no posicionamento seguro do equ: Assist in the safe positioning of the equipment without breaking the sterility of the surgical field, often using sterile covers on the C-arm.
translations.Zelar pelo conforto e posicionamento do: Ensure patient comfort and positioning, as the surgical table must be radiolucent and moved according to X-ray needs.
translations.é um dispositivo eletrônico programável: is a programmable electronic device designed to infuse fluids, nutrients, or medications in a controlled, precise, and safe manner into the patient's circulatory system. In the operating room, it is essential for continuous hydration, vasoactive drugs, antibiotics, and neuromuscular blockers.
translations.Montar corretamente o equipo (específico: Correctly assemble the tubing (specific to each pump) and prime it without air bubbles.
translations.Programar volume, tempo e vazão (ml/h) c: Program volume, time, and flow rate (ml/h) according to medical prescription or anesthesia protocol.
translations.Monitorar constantemente os alarmes visu: Continuously monitor visual and audible alarms (occlusion, air in line, infusion end).
translations.Similar à bomba de infusão padrão, porém: Similar to the standard infusion pump, but specifically designed to push the plunger of a syringe. The
translations.é utilizada para a administração de pequ: is used for administering small volumes with millimeter precision, being the gold standard for total intravenous anesthesia (TIVA), infusion of strong opioids, and potent sedatives where error margins are not tolerated.
translations.Identificar corretamente a seringa acopl: Correctly identify the attached syringe with the drug name, concentration, and preparation.
translations.Garantir o encaixe perfeito da seringa n: Ensure perfect fit of the syringe in the pump to avoid accidental bolus infusions (siphon effect).
translations.Estar alerta para o momento da troca da: Be alert for syringe replacement time, avoiding interruptions in the patient's sedation or analgesia during surgery.
translations.é um monitor não invasivo que mede a con: is a non-invasive monitor that measures the concentration or partial pressure of carbon dioxide (CO2) in the patient's exhaled air (EtCO2), creating a continuous waveform (capnogram). It is the fastest and most reliable tool to confirm successful endotracheal intubation and to monitor the effectiveness of pulmonary ventilation in patients under general anesthesia.
translations.Auxiliar na conexão da linha de capnogra: Assist in connecting the capnography line between the ventilatory circuit (tube/laryngeal mask) and the monitor module.
translations.Observar o traçado gráfico (forma de ond: Observe the waveform to early detect accidental extubation or obstructions (abnormal waves).
translations.Verificar integridade da linha coletora,: Check the integrity of the sampling line, ensuring no moisture or secretion blocks the sensor.
translations.(frequentemente com função de desfibrila: (often with a built-in defibrillator function) is a vital emergency device. It delivers an electrical shock to the heart to reverse life-threatening cardiac arrhythmias. Synchronized cardioversion is used for tachyarrhythmias, while defibrillation (asynchronous shock) is the primary intervention to reverse Ventricular Fibrillation (cardiac arrest).
translations.Testar o funcionamento do equipamento di: Test the equipment's functionality daily, ensuring it is always plugged in for full charge.
translations.Durante o uso, preparar as pás fornecend: During use, prepare the paddles by applying conductive gel or quickly and correctly applying disposable adhesive pads.
translations.Garantir a segurança da cena (afastando: Ensure scene safety (clear everyone from the bed/metal table) at the moment of the "shock" commanded by the physician.
translations.é um armário móvel estruturado estrategi: is a mobile cabinet strategically structured with drawers containing everything needed for immediate response to a cardiac arrest or severe complication. Its drawers are standardized, dividing medications, airway materials (laryngoscope, tubes), venous access materials, and IV fluids/solutions.
translations.Garantir a conferência de todos os insum: Ensure all supplies are checked, verifying expiration dates and quantities according to the institution's protocol.
translations.Romper o lacre apenas em casos de emergê: Break the seal only in emergencies and ensure complete replenishment of materials immediately after the event.
translations.Manter o carro em local de fácil acesso,: Keep the cart in an easily accessible, unobstructed location, always ready for use in the operating room.
translations.(ou Estação de Anestesia) é um dos equip: (or Anesthesia Station) is one of the most complex pieces of equipment in the operating room. It allows the delivery of oxygen and precise mixing of medical gases and volatile anesthetics (vaporizers). Additionally, it functions as an integrated mechanical ventilator and has a CO2 absorption system (soda lime) for safe breathing under general anesthesia.
translations.Realizar a conexão correta dos gases na: Correctly connect the gases to the wall outlet and check the breathing circuit (sterile/disposable tubing) before each surgery.
translations.Apoiar o médico anestesiologista durante: Assist the anesthesiologist during induction and reversal of anesthesia.
translations.Verificar a saturação e validade da cal: Check the saturation and validity of the soda lime (which changes color when exhausted) and replace it according to institutional guidelines.
translations.capta, processa e exibe graficamente os: captures, processes, and graphically displays the patient's essential vital signs in real time. Basic parameters include electrocardiogram (ECG), heart rate, pulse oximetry (SpO2), non-invasive blood pressure (NIBP), and body temperature. In major surgeries, modules such as invasive blood pressure (IBP) are also connected.
translations.Realizar a instalação rápida e segura do: Perform quick and safe installation of sensors (chest electrodes, finger oximetry, and arm cuff) as soon as the patient arrives at the surgical table.
translations.Prestar atenção aos alarmes que soam dur: Pay attention to alarms that sound during the procedure, informing the anesthesiologist of any abrupt changes.
translations.Garantir a limpeza e desinfecção dos cab: Ensure cleaning and disinfection of cables and sensors with each patient change.
translations.(ou Mesa Cirúrgica) é o epicentro do blo: (or Surgical Table) is the epicenter of the operating room. It is a robust, articulated, and often motorized device designed to safely support the patient and allow positioning in various angles and complex positions (Trendelenburg, lithotomy, prone, Fowler) necessary for anatomical access by the surgeon.
translations.Manusear os controles da cama sob orient: Operate the bed controls under medical guidance, gradually adjusting to the correct anatomical position.
translations.Assegurar a proteção do paciente instala: Ensure patient protection by installing gel or foam cushions on bony prominences to prevent pressure injuries and nerve damage.
translations.Afixar os cintos de segurança corretamen: Properly fasten safety belts and lock the table base to prevent any unwanted movement.
translations.é uma estrutura ajustável em altura com: is a height-adjustable structure with an inverted "L"-shaped tray positioned directly over (cantilevered) the patient's lower limbs. On it, the scrub nurse organizes instruments for immediate and continuous use (scalpels, scissors, hemostatic forceps) following surgical steps (diérese, hemostasis, exeresis, and synthesis).
translations.Vestir a mesa com campos ou capas estére: Drape the table with sterile drapes or covers (usually under the responsibility of the scrub nurse or circulator).
translations.O Circulante de Sala não deve tocar nas: The Circulating Nurse must not touch the edges or surface of the table, supplying sterile materials by gently tossing them onto the field or handing them using aseptic technique.
translations.Evitar choques e esbarrões mecânicos na: Avoid mechanical shocks and bumps to the table to prevent breaking aseptic technique and dropping instruments.
translations.(Back Table) é uma mesa retangular e mai: (Back Table) is a rectangular, larger table strategically positioned near the scrub nurse but away from the direct surgical line. It serves to store extra supplies of gauze, sponges, suture threads, basins with solutions, heavy complementary instrument sets, and sterile equipment that does not fit on the Mayo stand.
translations.O enfermeiro ou técnico circulante auxil: The circulating nurse or technician assists the scrub nurse by opening supply packages and sterile sets, offering them on the back table.
translations.Colaborar na conferência rigorosa de com: Collaborate in the rigorous counting of sponges and sharps on the back table before closing the patient's cavity.
translations.Proteger e sinalizar o espaço da mesa au: Protect and mark the area of the back table so that non-scrubbed personnel do not contaminate the area.
translations.é a estrutura de iluminação de alta potê: is a high-power lighting structure suspended from the ceiling of the room. It uses advanced halogen or LED technology to emit cold light that does not dry out patient tissues, and has optical geometry designed to eliminate shadowing from the surgeon's head and hands in the operative field.
translations.Encaixar manoplas de silicone autoclaváv: Attach autoclavable silicone handles (sterile) to the center of the light, allowing the scrubbed surgeon to adjust the light.
translations.Ligar o equipamento, ajustar os satélite: Turn on the equipment, adjust satellite lights on external demand, and regulate light intensity if requested by the physician.
translations.Efetuar a limpeza concorrente minuciosa: Perform thorough concurrent cleaning after each use (on the non-sterile portion) to prevent dust accumulation over the operative area.
translations.Torre e Equipamentos para Cirurgia Minim: Tower and Equipment for Minimally Invasive Surgery
translations., um rack complexo que aloja: um monitor: , a complex rack that houses: a high-definition surgical monitor, a camera processor, a powerful cold light source (LED or Xenon), and a CO2 insufflator, which generates pneumoperitoneum (abdominal inflation) to create internal space for instruments. It is the foundation of modern minimally invasive surgery.
translations.Instalar e conferir as pressões do cilin: Install and check pressures of the external Carbon Dioxide (CO2) cylinder connected to the insufflator.
translations.Receber os cabos estéreis (cabo de fibra: Receive sterile cables (fiber optic cable, gas hose) from the scrub nurse's hands and connect them securely to the tower.
translations.Ter extremo cuidado no manuseio das ótic: Handle optics and cables with extreme care, as they are made of highly fragile and expensive crystal or fibers.
translations.é um motor gerador de sucção (vácuo) aco: It is a suction (vacuum) generator motor coupled to graduated collection bottles. Its purpose is to remove in real time extravasated blood, exudates, irrigation serum, tissue fragments, and scalpel smoke from the surgical bed, providing the surgeon with a clean visual field to act.
translations.Ligar as mangueiras estéreis (que vêm do: Connect the sterile hoses (coming from the surgical field) to the aspirator connector bottle.
translations.Monitorar o enchimento do frasco coletor: Monitor the filling of the collection bottle, proceeding with immediate replacement if it reaches the maximum limit to avoid losing suction during critical moments.
translations.Manejar o líquido aspirado com máximo ri: Handle the aspirated fluid with maximum biosafety rigor (PPE), discarding fluids in designated biohazard containers and/or solidifiers.
translations.é caracterizado padronizadamente pela co: It is standardized by the color blue throughout the national territory. This gas (often historically known as "laughing gas") is used by the anesthesiologist mixed with oxygen as an analgesic and hypnotic adjuvant, potentiating volatile inhaled anesthetics.
translations.Atuar no check-list da sala de operação: Act in the operating room checklist, attesting that the reserve cylinders are full through the manometer.
translations.Saber identificar os gases pela cor univ: Know how to identify gases by universal safety color (Green=O2, Yellow=Compressed Air, Blue=Nitrous Oxide).
translations.Assegurar o correto armazenamento e a im: Ensure correct storage and immobilization of reserve cylinders in the room to prevent tipping and risk of accidents.
translations.Acompanhe mais informações de enfermagem: Follow more nursing information on our Nursing Forum.

translations.Avalie a intensidade da dor do paciente: Assess the patient's pain intensity using the Numeric Pain Rating Scale (0 to 10). Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence for nursing practice.
translations.Quantificar a intensidade da dor referid: Quantify the intensity of pain reported by the patient using a simple numeric scale from 0 (no pain) to 10 (worst imaginable pain).
translations.Indicada para avaliação e reavaliação da: Indicated for assessment and reassessment of pain in any adult or adolescent patient able to understand and use numbers for self-assessment.
translations.Pacientes adultos e adolescentes orienta: Oriented adult and adolescent patients, able to communicate verbally or through gestures (pointing to the number).
translations.Peça ao paciente para atribuir um número: Ask the patient to assign a number from 0 to 10 to the intensity of pain felt at the moment.
Absence of pain reported by the patient.
translations.Dor de intensidade leve, geralmente não: Mild intensity pain, usually does not significantly interfere with daily activities.
translations.• Considerar medidas não farmacológicas\:
• Consider non-pharmacological measures
• Reassess periodically
• Simple analgesia if needed, as prescribed
translations.Dor de intensidade moderada, pode interf: Moderate intensity pain, may interfere with activities and rest.
translations.• Comunicar à equipe médica\n• Reavaliar:
• Communicate to medical team
• Reassess after analgesic intervention
• Investigate cause of pain
translations.Dor de forte intensidade, com significat: Severe intensity pain, with significant impact on well-being and possible need for immediate intervention.
translations.• Comunicar imediatamente à equipe médic:
• Communicate immediately to medical team
• Prioritize analgesic intervention
• Reassess at short interval after intervention
• Investigate and treat underlying cause
translations.Experiência sensorial e emocional desagr: Unpleasant sensory and emotional experience associated with actual or potential tissue damage, lasting more than 3 months.
translations.Relata sinais e sintomas de dor à equipe: Reports signs and symptoms of pain to healthcare team
translations.Avaliar a dor de forma abrangente (local: Assess pain comprehensively (location, characteristics, onset, duration, frequency, intensity)
translations.Registrar a intensidade da dor no prontu: Record pain intensity in medical record
translations.A Escala Numérica de Dor (END) é um dos: The Numeric Pain Rating Scale (NPRS) is one of the most widely used and validated instruments worldwide for unidimensional assessment of pain intensity, asking the patient to assign a number from 0 (no pain) to 10 (worst imaginable pain) to their pain experience.
translations.Amplamente recomendada por sociedades de: Widely recommended by pain societies and hospital accreditation bodies as the 'fifth vital sign' to be monitored, alongside temperature, pulse, respiration, and blood pressure.
translations.Apresenta boa confiabilidade teste-retes: Shows good test-retest reliability and strong correlation with other pain scales (Visual Analog Scale, Faces Pain Scale), being easy to understand and quick to apply in most oriented adult patients.
translations.Requer que o paciente compreenda o conce: Requires the patient to understand the numeric concept, which can be a limitation in young children, patients with severe cognitive impairment, or communication barriers — in these cases, behavioral or faces scales are recommended.
translations.Sempre utilize a mesma escala ao longo d: Always use the same scale throughout treatment to allow consistent comparison.
translations.Reavalie a dor após qualquer intervenção: Reassess pain after any analgesic intervention, within the appropriate interval.
translations.Em pacientes que não conseguem usar núme: In patients who cannot use numbers, consider the Faces Scale or behavioral scales.
translations.Registre não apenas o número, mas também: Record not only the number but also the location, characteristics, and factors that improve/worsen the pain.
translations.Qual a faixa de valores da Escala Numéri: What is the range of values for the Numeric Pain Rating Scale?
translations.A escala varia de 0 (sem dor) a 10 (pior: The scale ranges from 0 (no pain) to 10 (worst imaginable pain).
translations.Um escore de 8 pontos é classificado com: A score of 8 points is classified as which pain intensity?
translations.Escores de 7 a 10 são classificados como: Scores from 7 to 10 are classified as severe pain, requiring immediate communication to the medical team and prioritization of analgesia.
translations.A Escala Numérica de Dor é adequada para: Is the Numeric Pain Rating Scale suitable for all patients?
translations.Não, requer compreensão do conceito numé: No, it requires understanding of the numerical concept
translations.Pacientes que não compreendem o conceito: Patients who do not understand the numerical concept (young children, severe cognitive impairment) should be assessed with alternative scales, such as the Faces Scale.
translations.Com que frequência a dor deve ser reaval: How often should pain be reassessed?
translations.A dor deve ser avaliada como o 'quinto s: Pain should be assessed as the 'fifth vital sign', on admission, periodically according to institutional protocol, and always after analgesic interventions, within the expected onset time of the medication or measure used.
translations.O que fazer se o paciente não conseguir: What to do if the patient cannot use the numeric scale?
translations.Para pacientes que não compreendem númer: For patients who do not understand numbers (young children, cognitive impairment, communication barriers), the use of alternative scales such as the Faces Scale (Wong-Baker) or behavioral pain scales is recommended.
translations.Como funciona a Escala Numérica de Dor: How the Numeric Pain Rating Scale works
translations.<p>A Escala Numérica de Dor solicita que:
The Numeric Pain Rating Scale asks the patient to assign a number from 0 to 10 to the intensity of the pain felt, with 0 being no pain and 10 being the worst imaginable pain. It is simple, quick, and widely validated for oriented patients able to understand numbers.

Quick guide: 0 = No pain | 1-3 = Mild pain | 4-6 = Moderate pain | 7-10 = Severe pain.

translations.Quantificar a intensidade da dor referid: To quantify the intensity of pain reported by the patient using a simple numeric scale from 0 (no pain) to 10 (worst imaginable pain). Indicated for pain assessment and reassessment in any adult or adolescent patient able to understand and use numbers for self-assessment.

translations.A Escala Numérica de Dor solicita que o: The Numeric Pain Rating Scale asks the patient to assign a number from 0 to 10 to the intensity of the pain felt, with 0 being no pain and 10 being the worst imaginable pain. It is simple, quick, and widely validated for oriented patients able to understand numbers.
translations.0 = Sem dor | 1-3 = Dor leve | 4-6 = Dor: 0 = No pain | 1-3 = Mild pain | 4-6 = Moderate pain | 7-10 = Severe pain.

translations.. O diagnóstico de patologias e a avalia: . Diagnosis of pathologies and clinical evaluation together with laboratory findings is exclusive to physicians. Nursing professionals should have knowledge of laboratory test alterations to assist in developing the Nursing Care Systematization (NCS) and perform laboratory surveillance to activate protocols, Rapid Response Team (Code Yellow), and effective communication with the medical team in case of alterations.

translations.Calcule a Escala FAST (Face, Arm, Speech: Calculate the FAST Scale (Face, Arm, Speech, Time) for rapid recognition of suspected stroke. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Reconhecer rapidamente a suspeita de Aci: Rapidly recognize suspected stroke through 3 clinical findings (face, arm, speech), emphasizing the importance of time (Time) for treatment initiation.
translations.Indicada para reconhecimento rápido de s: Indicated for rapid stroke recognition by lay public, first responders, and prehospital emergency teams.
translations.Qualquer pessoa com suspeita de déficit: Any person with suspected acute neurological deficit/stroke.
translations.Peça para a pessoa sorrir. Um dos lados: Ask the person to smile. Is one side of the face drooping or numb?
translations.Alterado - um lado do rosto está caído/d: Abnormal - one side of the face is drooping/numb
translations.Peça para a pessoa levantar os dois braç: Ask the person to raise both arms. Does one arm drift downward or is it weak/numb?
translations.Alterado - um braço cai ou está fraco: Abnormal - one arm drifts down or is weak
translations.Peça para a pessoa repetir uma frase sim: Ask the person to repeat a simple phrase. Is speech slurred or strange?
translations.Alterado - fala arrastada, confusa ou au: Abnormal - slurred, confused, or absent speech
translations.Nenhum dos 3 achados (face, braço, fala): None of the 3 findings (face, arm, speech) are abnormal.
translations.• Manter vigilância caso surjam novos si:
• Maintain vigilance if new symptoms arise
• Absence of FAST signs does not completely rule out stroke — seek medical evaluation if any other clinical suspicion exists
translations.Suspeita de AVC - T de Tempo (Time) é Cr: Suspected Stroke - T for Time is Critical
translations.Um ou mais achados alterados (face, braç: One or more abnormal findings (face, arm, or speech) are strongly suggestive of stroke.
translations.• Acionar o serviço de emergência (ex: S:
• Activate emergency services (e.g., SAMU 192) IMMEDIATELY
• Record the exact time of symptom onset (or last known well time)
• Keep the person fasting and do not administer food, liquids, or medications orally
• Every minute counts: time to treatment directly impacts neurological prognosis
translations.Redução da circulação sanguínea cerebral: Reduced cerebral blood circulation, capable of compromising health, suspected by findings of facial, arm, and/or speech abnormalities.
translations.FAST aplicado rapidamente diante de qual: FAST applied rapidly upon any suspicion of acute neurological deficit
translations.Horário de início dos sintomas registrad: Time of symptom onset accurately recorded
translations.Serviço de emergência acionado imediatam: Emergency services activated immediately when indicated
translations.Aplicar o FAST rapidamente diante de qua: Apply FAST rapidly upon any suspicion of stroke
translations.Registrar com precisão o horário de iníc: Accurately record the time of symptom onset or last known well time
translations.Acionar imediatamente o serviço de emerg: Immediately activate emergency services when any finding is abnormal
translations.Manter a pessoa em jejum, sem administra: Keep the person fasting, without administering food, liquids, or medications orally
translations.Orientar familiares/comunidade sobre o r: Educate family/community on early recognition of stroke signs
translations.O FAST avalia 3 achados clínicos — Face: FAST evaluates 3 clinical findings — Face, Arm, and Speech — each scored as 0 (normal) or 1 (abnormal), summing from 0 to 3 abnormal findings. The 'T' for Time is not scored but reinforces the urgency of seeking immediate medical attention upon any abnormal finding.
translations.O mnemônico FAST foi popularizado no Rei: The FAST mnemonic was popularized in the UK as a public awareness campaign for rapid stroke recognition, derived from the Cincinnati Prehospital Stroke Scale (CPSS), with the addition of 'T' for Time to emphasize treatment urgency.
translations.Amplamente utilizado em campanhas públic: Widely used in public awareness campaigns and by emergency teams, with good sensitivity for detecting anterior circulation stroke. Has high sensitivity, being an effective tool for rapid initial triage.
translations.Pode ter menor sensibilidade para AVCs d: May have lower sensitivity for posterior circulation/cerebellar strokes, which may present with different symptoms (dizziness, incoordination, visual changes) not captured by the 3 classic findings. Some variations include additional items (e.g., BE-FAST, which adds Balance and Eyes) to increase sensitivity.
translations.FAST é um mnemônico: Face (rosto), Arm (: FAST is a mnemonic: Face, Arm, Speech, and Time — the first 3 are tested, the T reinforces urgency.
translations.A presença de qualquer um dos 3 achados: The presence of any of the 3 altered findings is sufficient to strongly suspect stroke and activate emergency services.
translations.Sempre registre o horário exato do iníci: Always record the exact time of symptom onset — this information is essential for decisions about reperfusion therapies (thrombolysis/thrombectomy).
translations.O FAST pode ter menor sensibilidade para: FAST may have lower sensitivity for posterior circulation strokes — variations such as BE-FAST (which adds Balance and Eyes) aim to increase detection of these cases.
translations.O que significa cada letra do mnemônico: What does each letter of the FAST mnemonic mean?
translations.FAST significa Face (rosto), Arm (braço): FAST stands for Face, Arm, Speech, and Time, being a mnemonic for rapid stroke recognition.
translations.O 'T' de Time no FAST é pontuado numeric: Is the 'T' of Time in FAST scored numerically?
translations.Sim, vale 1 ponto adicional: Yes, it is worth 1 additional point
translations.Não, reforça apenas a urgência de buscar: No, it only reinforces the urgency of seeking immediate care
translations.O T substitui os outros 3 itens: The T replaces the other 3 items
translations.O 'T' de Time não é pontuado numericamen: The 'T' of Time is not scored numerically; it reinforces that, given any altered finding, time to care is critical for prognosis.
translations.O FAST tem a mesma sensibilidade para to: Does FAST have the same sensitivity for all types of stroke?
translations.Sim, detecta igualmente todos os tipos: Yes, it detects all types equally
translations.Não, pode ter menor sensibilidade para A: No, it may have lower sensitivity for posterior circulation/cerebellar strokes
translations.Não se aplica a nenhum tipo de AVC: Does not apply to any type of stroke
translations.O FAST pode ter menor sensibilidade para: FAST may have lower sensitivity for posterior circulation strokes, which may present with symptoms such as dizziness and incoordination, not captured by the 3 classic findings (face, arm, speech).
translations.Qual a diferença entre o FAST e a Escala: What is the difference between FAST and the Cincinnati Prehospital Stroke Scale (CPSS)?
translations.O FAST e a CPSS avaliam essencialmente o: FAST and CPSS essentially assess the same 3 clinical findings (face, arm, speech), with FAST being popularized as a public awareness tool with the addition of 'T' for Time to reinforce urgency of care.
translations.Existem variações do FAST com mais itens: Are there variations of FAST with more items?
translations.Sim. Variações como o BE-FAST acrescenta: Yes. Variations such as BE-FAST add assessment of Balance and Eyes, aiming to increase sensitivity for detecting posterior circulation strokes, which may not be captured by the 3 classic FAST findings.
translations.<p>O FAST avalia 3 achados — Face, Arm (:
FAST assesses 3 findings — Face, Arm, and Speech — each scored as 0 (normal) or 1 (abnormal), reinforcing the importance of Time to seek immediate care.

Quick guide: 0 = No warning signs | 1-3 = Suspected stroke, time is critical — activate emergency services immediately.

translations.1 — Alterado - um braço cai ou está frac: 1 — Abnormal - one arm drifts down or is weak
translations.1 — Alterado - fala arrastada, confusa o: 1 — Abnormal - slurred, confused, or absent speech
translations.Reconhecer rapidamente a suspeita de Aci: Rapidly recognize suspected stroke using 3 clinical findings (face, arm, speech), emphasizing the importance of time for treatment initiation. Indicated for rapid stroke suspicion recognition by lay public, first responders, and prehospital emergency teams.

translations.O FAST avalia 3 achados — Face, Arm (bra: FAST assesses 3 findings — Face, Arm, and Speech — each scored as 0 (normal) or 1 (abnormal), emphasizing the importance of Time to seek immediate care.
translations.0 = Sem sinais de alerta | 1-3 = Suspeit: 0 = No warning signs | 1-3 = Suspected stroke, time is critical — activate emergency services immediately.
translations.Escala FLACC - Avaliação de Dor em Crian: FLACC Scale - Pain Assessment in Children
translations.Calcule a Escala FLACC (Face, Legs, Acti: Calculate the FLACC Scale (Face, Legs, Activity, Cry, Consolability) to assess pain in young children or patients unable to verbally communicate pain. Includes interpretation and evidence.
translations.Avaliar a intensidade da dor por meio da: Assess pain intensity through behavioral observation in young children or patients unable to verbally communicate pain.
translations.Indicada para crianças entre 2 meses e 7: Indicated for children aged 2 months to 7 years, or any patient with verbal communication difficulties (cognitive impairment, sedation, intubation).
translations.Crianças de 2 meses a 7 anos e pacientes: Children aged 2 months to 7 years and patients of any age with verbal communication difficulties.
translations.Careta ou franzir de testa ocasional, re: Occasional grimace or frown, withdrawn, disinterested
translations.Tremor de queixo frequente a constante,: Frequent to constant quivering chin, clenched jaw
translations.Contorcendo-se, movendo-se para frente e: Lying quietly, normal position, moves easily
translations.Arqueado, rígido ou com movimentos brusc: Squirming, shifting back and forth, tense
translations.Choro constante, grita ou soluça; queixa: Occasional moans or whimpers; occasional complaint
translations.Consolabilidade: Constant crying, screams, or sobs; frequent complaints
translations.Difícil de consolar ou confortar: Reassured by occasional touching, hugging, or talking; distractible
translations.• Considerar medidas não farmacológicas:
• Consider non-pharmacological comfort measures
• Reassess periodically
translations.• Comunicar à equipe médica\n• Considera:
• Communicate to medical team
• Consider analgesia as prescribed
• Reassess after intervention
translations.• Comunicar imediatamente à equipe médic:
• Immediately communicate to medical team
• Prioritize analgesic intervention
• Reassess at short interval after intervention
translations.Experiência sensorial e emocional desagr: Unpleasant sensory and emotional experience associated with actual or potential tissue damage, sudden onset, with intensity from mild to severe.
translations.Comportamentos de dor avaliados de forma: Pain behaviors systematically assessed by FLACC
translations.Redução do escore FLACC após intervenção: Reduction in FLACC score after intervention
translations.Utilizar a Escala FLACC de forma consist: Use the FLACC Scale consistently to assess pain in young children or non-communicative patients
translations.Oferecer medidas não farmacológicas de c: Offer non-pharmacological comfort measures (holding, distraction, non-nutritive sucking)
translations.Registrar a pontuação FLACC no prontuári: Record FLACC score in the medical record
translations.A Escala FLACC avalia 5 categorias compo: The FLACC Scale assesses 5 behavioral categories — Face, Legs, Activity, Cry, Consolability — each scored from 0 to 2, totaling a score from 0 to 10 points, to estimate pain intensity through behavioral observation.
translations.Desenvolvida por Sandra Merkel e colabor: Developed by Sandra Merkel and colleagues at the University of Michigan, it is one of the most widely used behavioral pain scales in young children and patients unable to communicate verbally.
translations.Amplamente validada em crianças de 2 mes: Widely validated in children aged 2 months to 7 years, including postoperative contexts, with good correlation with other pain scales and good inter-rater reliability.
translations.Pode ser influenciada por fatores além d: May be influenced by factors other than physical pain, such as hunger, sleep, or separation anxiety. In children with special needs or neurological impairment, adaptations or use of specific scales (e.g., revised FLACC) may be required.
translations.A FLACC é especialmente útil em crianças: The FLACC is especially useful in children aged 2 months to 7 years or in any patient unable to verbally communicate pain.
translations.Observe a criança por pelo menos 1 a 2 m: Observe the child for at least 1 to 2 minutes before scoring each category.
translations.Fatores como fome, sono e ansiedade de s: Factors such as hunger, sleep, and separation anxiety may influence observed behavior — consider the full clinical context.
translations.Reavalie a dor após qualquer intervenção: Reassess pain after any analgesic intervention or comfort measure.
translations.O que significa a sigla FLACC?: What does the acronym FLACC stand for?
translations.FLACC é a sigla em inglês para Face (Fac: FLACC is an acronym for Face, Legs, Activity, Cry, and Consolability.
translations.Qual a pontuação máxima da Escala FLACC?: What is the maximum score of the FLACC scale?
translations.A FLACC soma 5 categorias pontuadas de 0: The FLACC sums 5 categories scored from 0 to 2 each, totaling a maximum of 10 points.
translations.Para qual faixa etária a FLACC é validad: For which age range is the FLACC validated?
translations.A FLACC foi validada para uso em criança: The FLACC has been validated for use in children aged 2 months to 7 years, as well as other patients unable to verbally communicate pain.
translations.A FLACC pode ser usada em adultos?: Can the FLACC be used in adults?
translations.Embora tenha sido desenvolvida para cria: Although developed for young children, the FLACC can also be used in adults unable to communicate verbally, such as sedated, intubated patients or those with severe cognitive impairment, with appropriate clinical caveats.
translations.Fatores não relacionados à dor podem inf: Can non-pain factors influence the FLACC score?
translations.Sim. Fome, sono, ansiedade de separação: Yes. Hunger, sleep, separation anxiety from parents, and fear of the hospital environment can influence observed behaviors, so it is important to consider the full clinical context when interpreting the score.
translations.<p>A Escala FLACC avalia 5 categorias co:
The FLACC Scale assesses 5 behavioral categories — Face, Legs, Activity, Cry, and Consolability — each scored from 0 to 2, summing to a total score of 0 to 10 points.

Quick guide: 0 = No pain | 1-3 = Mild pain | 4-6 = Moderate pain | 7-10 = Severe pain.

translations.Calcule a Escala de Coma FOUR (Full Outl: Calculate the FOUR (Full Outline of UnResponsiveness) Score for detailed neurological assessment, including intubated patients. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Avaliar de forma detalhada o nível de co: To assess the level of consciousness in critically ill patients in detail, including brainstem reflexes and respiratory pattern, overcoming limitations of the Glasgow Coma Scale in intubated patients.
translations.Indicada para pacientes neurocríticos, i: Indicated for neurocritical patients, including those on mechanical ventilation or intubated, where the Glasgow Coma Scale's verbal component is compromised.
translations.Pacientes adultos em estado crítico com: Adult critically ill patients with decreased level of consciousness, especially in ICU and neurocritical care.
translations.Avalie a abertura ocular e capacidade de: Assess eye opening and ability to track visually.
translations.E4 — Pálpebras Abertas, Rastreia ou Pisc: E4 — Eyelids Open, Tracking or Blinking to Command
translations.Olhos abertos ou capazes de abrir, rastr: Eyes open or able to open, tracking or blinking to command.
translations.Olhos abertos, mas sem rastreamento visu: Eyes open, but no visual tracking.
Eyelids closed, open to loud voice.
translations.Pálpebras fechadas, abrem apenas ao estí: Eyelids closed, open only to painful stimulus.
translations.Pálpebras permanecem fechadas mesmo com: Eyelids remain closed even with painful stimulus.
translations.Avalie a melhor resposta motora observad: Assess the best motor response observed, including specific hand gestures of the scale.
translations.M4 — Sinal de Positivo, Punho Fechado ou: M4 — Thumbs Up, Fist, or Peace Sign
translations.Realiza gestos específicos ao comando (p: Performs specific gestures to command (thumbs up, fist, peace sign).
translations.Localiza e tenta afastar o estímulo dolo: Localizes and attempts to remove painful stimulus.
translations.M0 — Sem Resposta ou Mioclonia Generaliz: M0 — No Response or Generalized Myoclonus
translations.Ausência de resposta motora à dor, ou es: No motor response to pain, or generalized myoclonus status (poor prognosis).
translations.Avalie os reflexos pupilar, corneano e d: Assess pupillary, corneal, and cough reflexes.
translations.B4 — Reflexos Pupilar e Corneano Present: B4 — Pupillary and Corneal Reflexes Present
translations.Reflexos pupilar e corneano preservados: Pupillary and corneal reflexes preserved bilaterally.
translations.B3 — Uma Pupila Fixa e Dilatada: B3 — One Pupil Fixed and Dilated
translations.Uma pupila fixa e dilatada (midríase par: One pupil fixed and dilated (unilateral fixed dilated pupil).
translations.B2 — Reflexo Pupilar ou Corneano Ausente: B2 — Pupillary or Corneal Reflex Absent
translations.Ausência de um dos reflexos (pupilar ou: Absence of one reflex (pupillary or corneal).
translations.B1 — Reflexos Pupilar e Corneano Ausente: B1 — Pupillary and Corneal Reflexes Absent
translations.Ausência de ambos os reflexos, pupilar e: Absence of both pupillary and corneal reflexes.
translations.B0 — Ausência de Reflexo Pupilar, Cornea: B0 — Absence of Pupillary, Corneal, and Cough Reflexes
translations.Ausência de todos os reflexos de tronco: Absence of all assessed brainstem reflexes, including cough reflex.
translations.Avalie o padrão respiratório do paciente: Assess the patient's respiratory pattern, considering whether on mechanical ventilation or not.
translations.Paciente não intubado, com padrão respir: Patient not intubated, with regular respiratory pattern.
Patient not intubated, with Cheyne-Stokes respiratory pattern.
Patient not intubated, with irregular respiratory pattern.
translations.Paciente intubado, respirando acima da f: Intubated patient, breathing above the set ventilator rate.
translations.R0 — Respira na Frequência do Ventilador: R0 — Breaths at Ventilator Rate or Apnea
translations.Paciente intubado, respirando exatamente: Intubated patient, breathing exactly at ventilator rate, or apnea.
translations.Comprometimento neurológico grave, assoc: Severe neurological impairment, associated with higher risk of mortality and worse functional prognosis.
translations.• Avaliação neurológica intensiva e seri:
• Intensive and serial neurological assessment
• Investigate reversible causes
• Discuss prognosis with multidisciplinary team
• Continuous neurological monitoring
translations.Comprometimento neurológico moderado. Re: Moderate neurological impairment. Requires rigorous monitoring and investigation of underlying causes.
translations.• Reavaliação neurológica frequente\n• I:
• Frequent neurological reassessment
• Investigate and treat reversible causes
• Monitor for signs of deterioration
translations.Função neurológica preservada ou com com: Preserved neurological function or mild impairment.
translations.• Manter monitorização de rotina\n• Reav:
• Maintain routine monitoring
• Reassess per unit protocol
translations.Diminuição da circulação sanguínea cereb: Decreased cerebral blood circulation, potentially compromising health.
translations.Risco de entrada de secreções gastrintes: Risk of entry of gastrointestinal secretions, oropharyngeal secretions, or solids/liquids into the tracheobronchial passages, associated with diminished protective reflexes.
translations.Nível de consciência adequado ao quadro: Level of consciousness appropriate to clinical condition
translations.Avaliar resposta ocular, motora, reflexo: Assess ocular response, motor response, brainstem reflexes, and respiratory pattern
translations.Documentar o escore FOUR a cada avaliaçã: Document the FOUR score at each assessment
translations.Comunicar imediatamente qualquer deterio: Immediately report any deterioration to the medical team
translations.A Escala de Coma FOUR (Full Outline of U: The FOUR (Full Outline of UnResponsiveness) Coma Scale was developed by Wijdicks and colleagues at the Mayo Clinic in 2005, assessing 4 components (ocular response, motor response, brainstem reflexes, and respiratory pattern), each scored from 0 to 4, totaling 0 to 16 points.
translations.Desenvolvida para superar limitações da: Developed to overcome limitations of the Glasgow Coma Scale in intubated patients (inability to assess verbal response) and to detect minimally conscious states and locked-in syndrome through assessment of brainstem reflexes.
translations.Estudos comparativos demonstram boa conf: Comparative studies demonstrate good interrater reliability and predictive ability for mortality comparable or superior to the Glasgow Coma Scale, with the advantage of being applicable in intubated patients.
translations.É uma escala mais complexa que a de Glas: It is a more complex scale than the Glasgow Coma Scale, requiring greater team training for correct application of brainstem reflex components.
translations.A Escala FOUR é especialmente útil em pa: The FOUR Scale is especially useful in intubated patients, where the Glasgow Coma Scale loses verbal assessment.
translations.Avalie os reflexos de tronco encefálico: Assess brainstem reflexes carefully and with adequate training, as they are the most specific component of the scale.
translations.Escores baixos no componente motor (mioc: Low scores on the motor component (generalized myoclonus) have a strong association with poor prognosis.
translations.Reavalie seriadamente para acompanhar a: Reassess serially to monitor the evolution of the neurological condition.
translations.Quantos componentes compõem a Escala de: How many components make up the FOUR Coma Scale?
translations.A FOUR avalia 4 componentes: resposta oc: The FOUR assesses 4 components: ocular response (E), motor response (M), brainstem reflexes (B), and respiration (R).
translations.Qual a principal vantagem da FOUR sobre: What is the main advantage of the FOUR over the Glasgow Coma Scale?
translations.Pode ser aplicada em pacientes intubados: It can be applied in intubated patients
translations.A FOUR não depende de resposta verbal, p: The FOUR does not depend on verbal response, so it can be applied in intubated or tracheostomized patients, unlike the Glasgow Coma Scale.
translations.Qual a pontuação máxima possível na Esca: What is the maximum possible score on the FOUR Scale?
translations.Cada um dos 4 componentes varia de 0 a 4: Each of the 4 components ranges from 0 to 4, totaling a maximum score of 16 points.
translations.A Escala FOUR substitui a Escala de Glas: Does the FOUR Scale replace the Glasgow Coma Scale?
translations.Não necessariamente. Ambas são utilizada: Not necessarily. Both are used in clinical practice, but the FOUR is particularly useful in intubated patients, where the Glasgow verbal assessment cannot be performed.
translations.É necessário treinamento especial para a: Is special training required to apply the FOUR Scale?
translations.Sim. A avaliação dos reflexos de tronco: Yes. Assessment of brainstem reflexes requires specific team training, being more complex than applying the Glasgow Coma Scale.
translations.Como funciona a Escala de Coma FOUR: How does the FOUR Coma Scale work?
translations.<p>A Escala FOUR avalia 4 componentes —:
The FOUR Score assesses 4 components — eye response, motor response, brainstem reflexes, and respiratory pattern — each scored from 0 to 4, totaling 0 to 16 points. It was developed to overcome the limitation of the Glasgow Coma Scale in intubated patients.

Quick guide: 13-16 = Preserved/mild | 9-12 = Moderate | 0-8 = Severe.

translations.Avaliar de forma detalhada o nível de co: To assess in detail the level of consciousness in critically ill patients, including brainstem reflexes and respiratory pattern, overcoming limitations of the Glasgow Coma Scale in intubated patients. Indicated for neurocritical patients, including those on mechanical ventilation or intubated, where the Glasgow Coma Scale has its verbal component compromised.
translations.WIJDICKS, E. F. M. et al. Validation of: WIJDICKS, E. F. M. et al. Validation of a new coma scale: The FOUR score. Annals of Neurology, v. 58, n. 4, p. 585-593, 2005.

translations.A Escala FOUR avalia 4 componentes — res: The FOUR Score assesses 4 components — eye response, motor response, brainstem reflexes, and respiratory pattern — each scored from 0 to 4, totaling 0 to 16 points. It was developed to overcome the limitation of the Glasgow Coma Scale in intubated patients.
translations.Calcule a Escala de Fragilidade de Edmon: Calculate the Edmonton Frail Scale (EFS) to assess the degree of frailty in older adults, considering 9 clinical and functional domains. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Avaliar o grau de fragilidade em idosos: Assess the degree of frailty in older adults through 9 clinical and functional domains, aiding in care planning and identifying patients at higher risk of adverse outcomes.
translations.Indicada na avaliação geriátrica ampla,: Indicated in comprehensive geriatric assessment, especially in older adults in outpatient clinics, preoperative evaluation, or before relevant therapeutic decisions.
translations.Pacientes idosos (geralmente 65 anos ou: Older adult patients (generally 65 years or older) undergoing clinical or geriatric assessment.
translations.Avaliação da memória/cognição do pacient: Assessment of patient's memory/cognition (e.g., clock drawing test or clinical impression).
translations.Número de internações hospitalares no úl: Number of hospital admissions in the last year and self-perceived health.
translations.Necessidade de ajuda para atividades ins: Need for help with instrumental activities of daily living (shopping, transportation, finances, medication).
translations.Uso de 5 ou mais medicações regulares e/: Use of 5 or more regular medications and/or forgetting doses.
translations.Presença de sintomas sugestivos de trist: Presence of symptoms suggestive of persistent sadness or discouragement.
translations.Presença de problemas com controle de ur: Presence of problems with bladder/bowel control.
translations.Desempenho no teste Timed Up and Go (lev: Performance on the Timed Up and Go test (stand up from chair, walk 3 meters, return, and sit down).
translations.Ausência de fragilidade, compatível com: Absence of frailty, consistent with a vigorous and independent older adult.
translations.• Manter acompanhamento geriátrico de ro:
• Maintain routine geriatric follow-up
• Encourage physical activity and healthy habits
• Reassess periodically
translations.Idoso aparentemente vulnerável, sem frag: Apparently vulnerable older adult, without established frailty, but with factors requiring attention.
translations.• Investigar e intervir sobre fatores de:
• Investigate and intervene on identified vulnerability factors
• Reassess at a shorter interval
• Consider comprehensive geriatric assessment
translations.Fragilidade leve, com maior risco de des: Mild frailty, with increased risk of adverse outcomes (falls, hospitalization, functional decline).
translations.• Encaminhar para avaliação geriátrica a:
• Refer for comprehensive geriatric assessment
• Individualized care plan, including rehabilitation and social support as needed
• Review polypharmacy
translations.Fragilidade moderada, com risco signific: Moderate frailty, with significant risk of adverse outcomes and greater need for support.
translations.• Avaliação geriátrica ampla prioritária:
• Prioritize comprehensive geriatric assessment
• Intensive multidisciplinary care plan
• Involve family/caregivers in care planning
translations.Fragilidade grave, com alto risco de des: Severe frailty, with high risk of adverse outcomes, functional dependence, and mortality.
translations.• Avaliação geriátrica ampla urgente e p:
• Urgent comprehensive geriatric assessment and intensive care plan
• Discuss care goals with patient and family
• Structured multiprofessional support (nursing, physiotherapy, nutrition, social work)
translations.Estado clínico dinâmico e não linear de: Dynamic and nonlinear clinical state of instability that increases the risk of functional decline and/or physical and/or cognitive health decline, increased vulnerability, and decreased recovery capacity after a stressful event.
translations.Suscetibilidade aumentada a quedas, que: Increased susceptibility to falls, which may cause physical harm, related to functional and cognitive impairment identified in the frailty assessment.
translations.Risco de nutrição desequilibrada: menos: Risk of imbalanced nutrition: less than body requirements
translations.Risco de ingestão de nutrientes insufici: Risk of insufficient nutrient intake to meet metabolic needs, related to identified unintentional weight loss.
translations.Escore de fragilidade avaliado e monitor: Frailty score assessed and monitored over time
translations.Plano de cuidados individualizado implem: Individualized care plan implemented according to frailty level
translations.Suporte social e familiar adequado ident: Adequate social and family support identified or provided
translations.Aplicar a Escala de Fragilidade de Edmon: Apply the Edmonton Frail Scale in the comprehensive geriatric assessment
translations.Encaminhar para avaliação multiprofissio: Refer for multiprofessional evaluation according to identified frailty level
translations.Revisar a polifarmácia e simplificar esq: Review polypharmacy and simplify medication regimens when possible
translations.Avaliar e fortalecer a rede de suporte s: Assess and strengthen the older adult's social support network
translations.Monitorar peso, humor e desempenho funci: Monitor weight, mood, and functional performance periodically
translations.A Escala de Fragilidade de Edmonton aval: The Edmonton Frail Scale assesses 9 domains — cognition, general health status, functional independence, social support, medication use, nutrition, mood, continence, and functional performance — summing scores from 0 to 2 in each domain, for a total score of 0 to 17 points.
translations.Desenvolvida por Rolfson e colaboradores: Developed by Rolfson and colleagues at the University of Edmonton (Canada), it is one of the most widely used frailty screening tools due to its multidimensional approach and rapid applicability in different clinical contexts.
translations.Validada em diversos contextos clínicos: Validated in various clinical contexts and populations, including preoperative assessment, showing good correlation with adverse outcomes such as hospitalization, institutionalization, and mortality.
translations.Alguns itens dependem de avaliação subje: Some items depend on subjective assessment (e.g., health perception, mood) and patient collaboration. The scale screens for frailty but does not replace a complete comprehensive geriatric assessment for definitive therapeutic planning.
translations.A EFS avalia 9 domínios diferentes, ofer: The EFS assesses 9 different domains, offering a multidimensional view of frailty beyond purely physical aspects.
translations.O componente de desempenho funcional uti: The functional performance component uses the Timed Up and Go test, which can be timed during the assessment itself.
translations.Fragilidade não é sinônimo de dependênci: Frailty is not synonymous with dependence — frail older adults may still be independent but with greater vulnerability to stressful events.
translations.Utilize o resultado para direcionar enca: Use the result to guide referrals: mild to moderate frailty generally benefits from comprehensive geriatric assessment and multiprofessional interventions.
translations.Quantos domínios compõem a Escala de Fra: How many domains make up the Edmonton Frail Scale?
translations.A EFS avalia 9 domínios: cognição, estad: The EFS assesses 9 domains: cognition, general health status, functional independence, social support, medication use, nutrition, mood, continence, and functional performance.
translations.Qual teste é utilizado para avaliar o do: Which test is used to assess the 'functional performance' domain in the EFS?
translations.O domínio de desempenho funcional utiliz: The functional performance domain uses the Timed Up and Go test, timing the patient to stand, walk, and return to sitting.
translations.Fragilidade é sinônimo de dependência fu: Is frailty synonymous with total functional dependence?
translations.Não, um idoso frágil ainda pode ser inde: No, a frail older adult can still be independent but with greater vulnerability.
translations.Só se aplica a idosos institucionalizado: It only applies to institutionalized older adults.
translations.É o mesmo que demência: It is the same as dementia.
translations.Fragilidade representa maior vulnerabili: Frailty represents greater vulnerability to stressors and risk of decline, but is not synonymous with total functional dependence — many frail older adults still perform activities independently.
translations.A Escala de Fragilidade de Edmonton subs: Does the Edmonton Frail Scale replace the comprehensive geriatric assessment?
translations.Não. É uma ferramenta de rastreamento rá: No. It is a rapid screening tool that helps identify older adults at higher risk, directing which patients would benefit from a more detailed comprehensive geriatric assessment.
translations.Fragilidade é o mesmo que velhice avança: Is frailty the same as advanced old age?
translations.Não. Fragilidade é uma síndrome clínica: No. Frailty is a clinical syndrome characterized by increased vulnerability to stressors, which can occur at different advanced ages and is not present in all older adults, even the very old.
translations.Como funciona a Escala de Fragilidade de: How does the Edmonton Frail Scale work?
translations.<p>A EFS soma pontuações (0 a 2) em 9 do:
The EFS sums scores (0 to 2) across 9 domains: cognition, general health status, functional independence, social support, medication use, nutrition, mood, continence, and functional performance (Timed Up and Go), totaling 0 to 17 points.

Quick guide: 0-5 = Not frail | 6-7 = Vulnerable | 8-9 = Mild frailty | 10-11 = Moderate frailty | 12-17 = Severe frailty.
translations.Escala de Fragilidade de Edmonton - Aval: Edmonton Frail Scale - Geriatric Assessment | Nursing Calculators
translations.Escala de Fragilidade de Edmonton: cálcu: Edmonton Frail Scale: calculation, rationale, and evidence
translations.Avaliar o grau de fragilidade em idosos: Assess the degree of frailty in older adults through 9 clinical and functional domains, aiding in care planning and identifying patients at higher risk for adverse outcomes. Indicated in comprehensive geriatric assessment, especially in older adults in outpatient consultations, preoperative evaluation, or before relevant therapeutic decisions.
